name: A1
description: The A1 cocktail is a classic blend that showcases the botanical notes of gin, complemented by the orange flavors of Grand Marnier and the tartness of lemon juice, with a hint of sweetness from grenadine. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a refreshing yet sophisticated drink.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Mix well and serve over ice into a chilled glass.

name: ABC
description: The ABC shot is a visually stunning layered shot that combines the nutty sweetness of Amaretto, the creamy richness of Baileys Irish Cream, and the smooth warmth of Cognac. This shot is not only a treat for the eyes but also a delightful blend of flavors that make it a popular choice for celebrations and gatherings.
instructions: Pour Amaretto into the shot glass until it fills one third.
Slowly layer Baileys Irish Cream on top of the Amaretto by pouring it over the back of a spoon.
Finally, layer Cognac on top of the Baileys using the same spoon technique.

name: Ace
description: The Ace cocktail is a delightful blend that showcases the smoothness of gin complemented by the sweetness of grenadine and the richness of cream and egg white. This drink is a testament to the creativity of mixologists who have long experimented with textures and flavors, resulting in a cocktail that is both refreshing and indulgent.
instructions: Shake all the ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Strain into a cold martini glass.

name: ACID
description: The ACID cocktail is a potent shot that combines high-proof rums with a chaser, often enjoyed for its intense flavor and kick. The use of Bacardi 151, known for its high alcohol content, makes this drink a favorite among those seeking a bold experience. The addition of a chaser like Coke or Dr Pepper helps to balance the strong flavors.
instructions: Pour in the Bacardi 151 proof rum first.
Follow with Wild Turkey.
Serve with a Coke or Dr Pepper chaser.

name: AT&T
description: The AT&T cocktail is a refreshing highball that combines the crispness of vodka and gin with the effervescence of tonic water. This drink is perfect for warm weather and social gatherings, embodying the spirit of connection and enjoyment, much like its namesake.
instructions: Pour Absolut Vodka and Gin over ice in a highball glass.
Add Tonic water and stir gently.

name: Adam
description: The Adam cocktail is a classic blend that showcases the rich flavors of dark rum, balanced with the tartness of lemon juice and a hint of sweetness from grenadine. This cocktail is a testament to the creativity of mixologists who have long experimented with rum-based drinks, making it a delightful choice for any occasion.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: A. J.
description: The A. J. is a classic cocktail that showcases the unique flavor of Applejack, a type of apple brandy. This refreshing drink combines the sweetness of apple with the tartness of grapefruit juice, creating a balanced and invigorating experience. Perfect for those who appreciate fruit-forward cocktails with a historical twist.
instructions: Shake ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Affair
description: The Affair cocktail is a vibrant and refreshing drink that combines the sweetness of strawberry schnapps with the citrusy notes of orange juice and the tartness of cranberry juice. This delightful mix is topped with club soda, making it a perfect choice for warm weather gatherings or casual get-togethers. Its colorful appearance and fruity flavor profile make it a favorite among those looking for a light and enjoyable cocktail.
instructions: Pour strawberry schnapps, orange juice, and cranberry juice over ice in a highball glass.
Top with club soda and serve.

name: Avalon
description: This refreshing cocktail, created by Timo Haimi, took first prize in the 1991 Finlandia Vodka Long Drink Competition. The combination of Finlandia Vodka, fruity juices, and a splash of lemonade creates a vibrant drink that is both visually appealing and delicious, garnished with a spiraled cucumber skin and a red cherry for an extra touch of zest.
instructions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Layer the Finlandia Vodka, lemon juice, apple juice, and Pisang Ambon in the glass.
Top up with lemonade.
Stir slightly to combine the ingredients.
Garnish with a spiraled cucumber skin and a red cherry.

name: Apello
description: The Apello is a refreshing cocktail that combines the bright flavors of citrus juices with a hint of sweetness from the maraschino cherry. This drink is perfect for warm weather and is often enjoyed in a tall Collins glass, making it a delightful choice for any occasion.
instructions: Combine orange juice, grapefruit juice, and apple juice in a mixing glass.
Stir gently to mix the ingredients.
Strain into a Collins glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry.

name: Almeria
description: The Almeria cocktail is a delightful blend of dark rum and Kahlua, enriched with the creamy texture of egg white. This cocktail hails from the mid-20th century, showcasing the era's fascination with rich flavors and innovative techniques in mixology. The use of egg white not only adds a frothy texture but also enhances the drink's visual appeal, making it a classic choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Abilene
description: The Abilene cocktail is a refreshing blend that showcases the tropical flavors of dark rum, peach nectar, and orange juice. This drink is perfect for warm weather, evoking the sunny vibes of summer with every sip. Its origins are rooted in the classic cocktail culture, where fruity flavors were celebrated for their ability to complement spirits.
instructions: Pour all of the ingredients into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well.

name: Addison
description: The Addison is a classic cocktail that embodies the elegance of the martini era. With its simple yet refined combination of gin and vermouth, it showcases the balance of botanical flavors and herbal notes, making it a timeless choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Shake together all the ingredients.
Strain into a cold glass.

name: Aviation
description: The Aviation cocktail is a classic drink that dates back to the early 20th century, known for its beautiful pale blue hue and floral notes. It combines gin with maraschino liqueur and lemon juice, creating a refreshing and slightly tart flavor profile. The cocktail is often garnished with a cherry, adding a touch of sweetness to balance the drink's acidity.
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Applecar
description: The Applecar is a delightful cocktail that showcases the crisp flavors of apple and citrus, combining Applejack and Triple Sec with fresh lemon juice. This refreshing drink is perfect for those who enjoy a balance of sweetness and tartness, making it a classic choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Affinity
description: The Affinity cocktail is a classic drink that beautifully balances the smoky richness of Scotch with the herbal complexity of sweet and dry vermouths, accented by a hint of orange bitters. This cocktail dates back to the early 20th century and is a testament to the versatility of Scotch whisky in mixed drinks.
instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Stir well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Acapulco
description: The Acapulco cocktail is a refreshing blend that captures the essence of tropical flavors, combining light rum and triple sec with the tartness of lime juice. This cocktail is often associated with the vibrant beach culture of Acapulco, Mexico, and is a delightful choice for those looking to enjoy a taste of the tropics. The addition of egg white gives it a smooth texture and a frothy top, making it a visually appealing drink.
instructions: Combine light rum, triple sec, lime juice, sugar, and egg white in a shaker.
Add ice to the shaker and shake well until chilled.
Strain the mixture into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes.
Garnish with a sprig of mint and serve.

name: Alexander
description: The Alexander is a classic cocktail that dates back to the early 20th century, often associated with the Prohibition era. It combines the smoothness of gin with the sweetness of white crème de cacao and the richness of cream, creating a delightful and indulgent drink. Traditionally garnished with a sprinkle of nutmeg, it offers a warm, aromatic finish.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain contents into a cocktail glass.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Avalanche
description: The Avalanche is a creamy cocktail that combines the rich flavors of Crown Royal and Kahlua, creating a delightful blend that is both smooth and indulgent. This drink is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and creamy experience, reminiscent of a winter wonderland.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the Crown Royal and Kahlua.
Top off with cream and stir gently.

name: Allegheny
description: The Allegheny cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the harmonious blend of bourbon and dry vermouth, enhanced by the fruity notes of blackberry brandy and the refreshing acidity of lemon juice. This cocktail is a nod to the rich cocktail culture of the early 20th century, embodying the spirit of innovation and flavor that defined the era.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except lemon peel) with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Top with the twist of lemon peel and serve.

name: Americano
description: The Americano is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 1860s, originally known as the 'Milano-Torino' due to its ingredients hailing from Milan and Turin. It gained popularity in the United States during Prohibition, when Americans sought lighter, refreshing drinks. The combination of bitter Campari, sweet vermouth, and a splash of soda creates a delightful balance, making it a perfect aperitif.
instructions: Pour the Campari and sweet vermouth over ice in a Collins glass.
Add a splash of soda water.
Garnish with a half orange slice and a twist of lemon peel.

name: Algonquin
description: The Algonquin is a classic cocktail that dates back to the early 20th century, named after the Algonquin Hotel in New York City, where it was popular among literary figures and actors. This cocktail combines the warmth of blended whiskey with the herbal notes of dry vermouth and the tropical sweetness of pineapple juice, creating a refreshing yet sophisticated drink.
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake well to chill and mix the ingredients.
Strain the mixture into a chilled cocktail glass.
Serve immediately.

name: Artillery
description: The Artillery cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the harmonious blend of gin and sweet vermouth, enhanced by the complexity of bitters. This cocktail has roots in the early 20th century, often enjoyed by those who appreciate a refined yet straightforward libation.
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Afterglow
description: The Afterglow cocktail is a vibrant and refreshing drink that captures the essence of tropical flavors. With its bright colors and fruity profile, it evokes the feeling of a sunset, making it a perfect choice for summer gatherings or beach parties. The combination of grenadine, orange juice, and pineapple juice creates a delightful balance of sweetness and acidity, reminiscent of a warm evening glow.
instructions: Mix the grenadine, orange juice, and pineapple juice in a shaker.
Serve over ice in a highball glass.

name: Addington
description: The Addington is a classic cocktail that showcases the harmonious blend of sweet and dry vermouths, topped with a refreshing splash of soda water. This drink is a nod to the elegance of cocktail culture, often enjoyed in sophisticated settings.
instructions: Mix both the sweet vermouth and dry vermouth in a shaker.
Strain into a cold coupe glass.
Top up with a squirt of soda water.

name: B-52
description: The B-52 is a classic layered shot that combines the rich flavors of Irish cream, orange liqueur, and coffee liqueur. Named after the B-52 Stratofortress bomber, this cocktail became popular in the 1980s and is known for its visually striking layers and delightful taste.
instructions: Layer Baileys Irish cream into the shot glass.
Carefully layer Grand Marnier on top of the Baileys.
Finally, layer Kahlua on top of the Grand Marnier.
Serve with a stirrer.

name: B-53
description: The B-53 is a delightful layered shot that builds on the classic B-52, adding a unique twist with the rich flavors of Kahlua, the anise notes of Sambuca, and the orange zest of Grand Marnier. This visually striking drink is perfect for showcasing the art of layering cocktails.
instructions: Layer the Kahlua into the shot glass.
Carefully layer the Sambuca on top of the Kahlua.
Finally, layer the Grand Marnier on top of the Sambuca.

name: Bijou
description: The Bijou cocktail, meaning 'jewel' in French, is a classic drink that dates back to the late 19th century. It combines the herbal complexity of Green Chartreuse with the botanical notes of gin and the sweetness of vermouth, creating a vibrant and flavorful experience. This cocktail is often associated with the Art Deco movement and has been a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts for generations.
instructions: Add ice to a mixing glass.
Pour in the Green Chartreuse, gin, sweet vermouth, and orange bitters.
Stir well until chilled.
Strain into a chilled coupe glass.

name: Boxcar
description: The Boxcar cocktail is a delightful blend of gin and triple sec, enhanced by the tartness of lemon juice and the sweetness of grenadine. The addition of egg white gives it a smooth texture and a frothy top, reminiscent of classic sour cocktails. This drink is a nod to the era of train travel, where cocktails were crafted to be enjoyed on the go.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a sour glass.

name: Big Red
description: The Big Red is a vibrant shot that combines the creamy sweetness of Irish cream with the spicy kick of Goldschlager, a cinnamon schnapps. This shot is perfect for celebrations and adds a fun twist to any gathering.
instructions: Pour Irish cream into a shot glass.
Add Goldschlager on top.

name: Bellini
description: The Bellini is a classic Italian cocktail that originated in Venice during the 1940s. It was created by Giuseppe Cipriani, the founder of Harry's Bar, and is named after the Venetian painter Giovanni Bellini due to its distinctive peach color. This refreshing drink combines the sweetness of peach purée with the effervescence of sparkling wine, making it a popular choice for brunch and celebrations.
instructions: Pour peach purée into a chilled flute.
Add sparkling wine.
Stir gently.

name: Bramble
description: The Bramble is a modern classic cocktail that originated in the 1980s, created by renowned bartender Dick Bradsell in London. This refreshing drink combines the botanical notes of gin with the tartness of lemon juice and the sweetness of simple syrup, all beautifully complemented by the rich flavor of blackberry liqueur. The marbling effect created by the liqueur not only adds visual appeal but also enhances the drink's complexity.
instructions: Fill glass with crushed ice.
Build gin, lemon juice, and simple syrup over the ice.
Stir gently to combine.
Pour blackberry liqueur over in a circular fashion to create a marbling effect.
Garnish with two blackberries and a lemon slice.

name: Balmoral
description: The Balmoral is a classic cocktail that showcases the rich flavors of Scotch whisky, balanced with the herbal notes of sweet and dry vermouths. Named after the Scottish castle, this drink embodies the elegance and sophistication of its namesake, making it a favorite among whisky enthusiasts.
instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Stir well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Bluebird
description: The Bluebird cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the vibrant color of blue curaçao, combined with the botanical notes of gin and the sweetness of triple sec. Its origins can be traced back to the early 20th century, often enjoyed for its refreshing taste and eye-catching appearance. The addition of bitters adds depth, while the lemon twist and cherry garnish provide a delightful finish.
instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with crushed ice, combine the gin, triple sec, blue curaçao, and bitters.
Stir well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with the lemon twist and the cherry.

name: Brooklyn
description: The Brooklyn cocktail is a classic drink that dates back to the early 20th century, showcasing the rich flavors of rye whiskey complemented by the herbal notes of dry vermouth and the sweetness of maraschino liqueur. It is a sophisticated choice for those who appreciate a well-balanced cocktail.
instructions: Combine ingredients with ice.
Stir until well-chilled.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Bora Bora
description: The Bora Bora cocktail is a tropical delight that captures the essence of paradise in a glass. With its vibrant flavors of pineapple and passion fruit, this drink is reminiscent of sun-soaked beaches and exotic getaways. Perfect for summer gatherings or a refreshing escape any time of year.
instructions: Combine pineapple juice, passion fruit juice, lemon juice, and grenadine in a blender.
Blend until smooth and well mixed.
Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the blended mixture over the ice.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple and a cherry.

name: Boomerang
description: The Boomerang cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the harmonious blend of gin and vermouth, with a touch of bitters and maraschino liqueur for added complexity. This cocktail is a nod to the elegance of the early 20th century, often enjoyed in sophisticated settings. Its name suggests a return to the familiar flavors of gin and vermouth, making it a timeless choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, dry vermouth, bitters, and maraschino liqueur.
Stir well.
Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with the maraschino cherry.

name: Barracuda
description: The Barracuda is a tropical cocktail that combines the sweetness of rum and pineapple juice with the herbal notes of Galliano, topped with sparkling wine for a refreshing finish. This drink is perfect for summer gatherings and evokes the vibrant spirit of beachside bars.
instructions: Shake the rum, Galliano, pineapple juice, and lime juice with ice.
Strain into a coupe glass.
Top up with Prosecco.

name: Brigadier
description: The Brigadier is a delightful cocktail that combines the rich, comforting flavors of hot chocolate with the herbal complexity of Green Chartreuse and the fruity sweetness of Cherry Heering. This unique blend offers a warm and indulgent experience, perfect for cozy gatherings or a special treat on a chilly evening.
instructions: Warm a mug to enhance the drinking experience.
Mix the hot chocolate, Green Chartreuse, and Cherry Heering in the warmed mug.
Stir gently to combine the ingredients.

name: Broadside
description: The Broadside cocktail is a unique blend that showcases the bold flavors of rum and scotch, complemented by the herbal notes of fresh wormwood. This drink is a nod to the adventurous spirit of sailors and explorers who sought out exotic ingredients during their voyages. The use of bitters adds depth, making it a complex and intriguing choice for those looking to try something different.
instructions: Half fill the glass with ice cubes.
Crush the wormwood and add to the ice.
Pour the rum, scotch, and bitters over the mixture.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Buccaneer
description: The Buccaneer is a refreshing cocktail that combines the crispness of a light beer with the zesty notes of Bacardi Limon. This drink is perfect for warm weather and evokes the spirit of adventure on the high seas, making it a favorite among those who enjoy a laid-back yet flavorful experience.
instructions: Pour the Corona into a highball glass.
Add the Bacardi Limon to the beer.
Stir very gently to combine.

name: Brain Fart
description: The Brain Fart is a punch-style cocktail that combines high-proof spirits with refreshing sodas, creating a fun and potent party drink. Its origins are rooted in the creative mixology of the late 20th century, where bold flavors and high alcohol content became a staple in social gatherings.
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Mix slowly and gently to combine flavors.
Add ice to the punch bowl for chilling.
Ensure sodas are very cold before adding.

name: Blackthorn
description: The Blackthorn cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the unique flavor of sloe gin, a liqueur made from the fruit of the blackthorn bush. This cocktail combines the sweetness of vermouth with the tartness of sloe gin, creating a balanced and refreshing drink. Traditionally served in a cocktail glass, it is garnished with a twist of lemon peel, adding a citrusy aroma that enhances the overall experience.
instructions: Stir sloe gin and sweet vermouth with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

name: Bob Marley
description: The Bob Marley shot is a vibrant and colorful layered cocktail that pays homage to the legendary reggae musician. Known for its striking appearance, this shot combines the sweet, fruity flavor of Midori melon liqueur with the herbal notes of Jägermeister and the spicy kick of Goldschlager. It's a fun and festive drink perfect for parties and celebrations.
instructions: Pour the Midori melon liqueur into the shot glass as the first layer.
Slowly pour the Jägermeister over the back of a spoon to create the second layer.
Finally, layer the Goldschlager on top using the same spoon technique.

name: Bible Belt
description: The Bible Belt cocktail is a sweet and tangy drink that reflects the Southern charm and hospitality. Combining the fruity notes of Southern Comfort with the citrusy zing of lime and the sweetness of triple sec, this cocktail is perfect for warm evenings and gatherings.
instructions: Mix all ingredients together.
Pour over ice.

name: Bubble Gum
description: The Bubble Gum shot is a playful and colorful concoction that brings back childhood memories with its sweet and fruity flavors. This layered shot is perfect for parties and celebrations, offering a fun visual appeal and a delightful taste that combines the essence of various fruits.
instructions: Layer the vodka into the shot glass.
Carefully layer the banana liqueur on top of the vodka.
Next, layer the orange juice on top of the banana liqueur.
Finally, layer the peach schnapps on top of the orange juice.

name: Bumble Bee
description: The Bumble Bee is a visually striking layered shot that resembles the colors of a bumblebee. This cocktail showcases the art of layering spirits, creating a delightful presentation that is as enjoyable to look at as it is to drink. The combination of Baileys Irish Cream, Kahlua, and Sambuca offers a rich and sweet flavor profile, making it a favorite among those who appreciate both aesthetics and taste.
instructions: Pour the Baileys into the shot glass.
Take an upside down spoon and touch it to the inside wall of the glass.
Carefully add the Kahlua over the back of the spoon.
Repeat this process for the Sambuca.
If done properly, the alcohol will stay separated and resemble a bumble bee. Enjoy!

name: Baby Eskimo
description: The Baby Eskimo is a delightful cocktail that combines the rich flavors of Kahlua with the creamy texture of milk and vanilla ice cream. This drink is perfect for those looking for a light and refreshing option after a heavier cocktail. Its origins are rooted in the desire for a sweet, dessert-like beverage that can be enjoyed at any time.
instructions: Leave ice-cream out for about 10 minutes.
Add Kahlua and milk to the glass.
Stir with a chopstick, butter knife, or spoon.
Consume immediately and often.

name: Boston Sour
description: The Boston Sour is a classic cocktail that combines the rich flavors of blended whiskey with the tartness of lemon juice and the smooth texture of egg white. This drink is a variation of the traditional whiskey sour, adding a frothy element that enhances its appeal. The addition of a cherry and a slice of lemon not only garnishes the drink but also adds a touch of elegance.
instructions: Shake juice of lemon, powdered sugar, blended whiskey, and egg white with cracked ice.
Strain into a whiskey sour glass.
Add the slice of lemon and top with the cherry before serving.

name: Bahama Mama
description: The Bahama Mama is a tropical cocktail that embodies the essence of island life. Originating in the Bahamas, this vibrant drink combines a medley of rums with fruity flavors, making it a popular choice for beachgoers and cocktail enthusiasts alike. Its colorful presentation and refreshing taste transport you to a sunny paradise with every sip.
instructions: Add 90 ml of Rum, 30 ml of Dark Rum, 30 ml of Banana liqueur, 30 ml of Grenadine, 60 ml of Pineapple Juice, 60 ml of Orange Juice, and 30 ml of Sweet and Sour into a mixing glass.
Mix it all together and pour over a bunch of ice in a highball glass.
Top with club soda to taste and drink with a straw.

name: Casino
description: The Casino cocktail is a classic drink that dates back to the early 20th century, often associated with the glamorous world of speakeasies and cocktail lounges. Its combination of gin, maraschino liqueur, and citrus creates a refreshing yet complex flavor profile, making it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lemon twist and a maraschino cherry.
Serve without a straw.

name: Cafe Savoy
description: The Cafe Savoy is a delightful blend of coffee and spirits, originating from the rich coffee culture of Europe. This cocktail combines the warmth of coffee with the creamy texture of milk and the sweetness of triple sec, creating a comforting drink perfect for any time of day.
instructions: Fill the coffee mug almost to the top with coffee.
Add milk, triple sec, and brandy.
Stir to combine.

name: Caipirinha
description: The Caipirinha is Brazil's national cocktail, celebrated for its refreshing taste and simplicity. It combines the vibrant flavors of fresh lime with the unique spirit of Cachaça, a sugarcane liquor that embodies the essence of Brazilian culture. Traditionally enjoyed in a casual setting, this cocktail is a perfect representation of the country's festive spirit.
instructions: Place lime and sugar into an old fashioned glass and muddle them together using a muddler or a wooden spoon.
Fill the glass with ice.
Add the Cachaça.

name: Cream Soda
description: Cream Soda is a delightful and refreshing cocktail that combines the warmth of spiced rum with the effervescence of ginger ale. This drink has roots in the classic soda fountain beverages of the early 20th century, where soda was often mixed with spirits to create a fizzy treat. The addition of spiced rum adds a unique twist, making it a perfect choice for those who enjoy a sweet and spicy flavor profile.
instructions: Pour 30ml of Spiced Rum into a highball glass with ice.
Fill the glass with Ginger Ale to the top.

name: Cuba Libra
description: The Cuba Libra, often referred to as the Cuban Libre, is a classic cocktail that combines the rich flavors of dark rum with the refreshing zest of lime and the effervescence of Coca-Cola. Its origins trace back to the early 20th century, during the Cuban War of Independence, where it was said to be a drink of choice among American soldiers and locals alike. The drink symbolizes freedom and has become a staple in bars around the world.
instructions: Fill tall glass with ice cubes.
Add dark rum.
Rub cut edge of lime on rim of glass then squeeze juice into glass.
Fill with Coca-Cola.
Garnish with lime slice.
Enjoy!

name: Cherry Rum
description: The Cherry Rum cocktail is a delightful blend of light rum and cherry brandy, enriched with a touch of cream. This drink combines the tropical notes of rum with the sweet, fruity essence of cherries, creating a smooth and indulgent experience. Perfect for a summer evening or a festive gathering, this cocktail showcases the versatility of rum and the charm of cherry flavors.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Cuba Libre
description: The Cuba Libre is a classic cocktail that originated in Cuba during the late 19th century. It combines the refreshing flavors of lime and cola with the smoothness of light rum, making it a popular choice for those seeking a simple yet satisfying drink. The name translates to 'Free Cuba,' reflecting the drink's historical ties to Cuban independence.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add 60 ml of light rum.
Squeeze the juice of half a lime into the glass.
Top off with Coca-Cola to taste.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Corn n Oil
description: The Corn n Oil cocktail is a classic drink that hails from the Caribbean, combining the vibrant flavors of lime and falernum with the rich depth of aged rums. This cocktail is a testament to the region's rum heritage, showcasing the unique characteristics of both Añejo and blackstrap rums. The muddling of fresh lime adds a refreshing citrus note, while the bitters provide a complex finish, making it a delightful choice for rum enthusiasts.
instructions: Cut the half lime in half again.
Add the lime, falernum, and bitters to a rocks glass. Muddle.
Add the Añejo rum.
Add ice and stir.
Float the blackstrap rum on top.
Serve with a straw.

name: Citrus Coke
description: The Citrus Coke is a refreshing cocktail that combines the zesty notes of Bacardi Limon with the classic taste of Coca-Cola. This drink is perfect for warm days and casual gatherings, offering a delightful twist on the traditional rum and cola.
instructions: Pour half of the Coca-Cola into a highball glass.
Add Bacardi Limon.
Top off with the remaining Coca-Cola.
Stir gently and enjoy!

name: Casa Blanca
description: The Casa Blanca is a classic cocktail that embodies the spirit of the tropics with its refreshing blend of light rum and citrus flavors. Originating in the mid-20th century, this cocktail is a delightful choice for those seeking a taste of paradise in a glass.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Clover Club
description: The Clover Club is a classic cocktail that dates back to the late 19th century, originating from a private men's club in Philadelphia. This delightful drink combines the botanical notes of gin with the sweetness of grenadine and the tartness of lemon juice, all beautifully emulsified with egg white for a frothy texture. It's a perfect representation of the pre-Prohibition cocktail culture.
instructions: Dry shake ingredients to emulsify.
Add ice and shake again.
Strain into a chilled coupe glass.

name: Caipirissima
description: The Caipirissima is a delightful twist on the classic Caipirinha, substituting cachaça with white rum. This refreshing cocktail hails from Brazil and showcases the vibrant flavors of lime and sugar, making it a perfect summer drink. The Caipirissima is known for its balance of sweetness and tartness, providing a tropical escape with every sip.
instructions: Muddle the lime wedges and sugar in a glass to release the lime juice.
Add the white rum and stir to combine.
Fill the glass with crushed ice and stir again to chill.
Garnish with a lime wheel if desired.

name: City Slicker
description: The City Slicker is a classic cocktail that embodies the sophistication of urban nightlife. With its blend of brandy and triple sec, it offers a delightful balance of sweetness and tartness, making it a perfect choice for those looking to enjoy a refined drink. The addition of lemon juice adds a refreshing citrus note, enhancing the overall experience.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Campari Beer
description: The Campari Beer is a refreshing and slightly bitter cocktail that combines the herbal complexity of Campari with the crispness of lager. This drink is a perfect example of how Italian aperitivo culture can blend with casual beer enjoyment, creating a unique and flavorful experience.
instructions: Use a 450 ml beer mug.
Add 45 ml of Campari first.
Fill the glass with lager.

name: Chicago Fizz
description: The Chicago Fizz is a delightful cocktail that combines the smoothness of light rum with the rich sweetness of port, balanced by the tartness of lemon juice. This refreshing drink is shaken to create a frothy texture from the egg white, making it a unique and enjoyable experience. The addition of carbonated water gives it a lively finish, perfect for warm evenings.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice.
Strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes.
Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

name: Cosmopolitan
description: The Cosmopolitan, often referred to as the 'Cosmo', gained popularity in the 1990s and is a quintessential cocktail of the modern era. Its vibrant pink hue and refreshing taste have made it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts. The drink is a perfect blend of vodka, lime juice, Cointreau, and cranberry juice, creating a balanced and sophisticated flavor profile.
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and double strain into a large cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

name: Coffee-Vodka
description: The Coffee-Vodka liqueur is a delightful blend of rich coffee and smooth vodka, steeped with vanilla for an aromatic experience. This recipe harks back to the tradition of infusing spirits with flavors, a practice that has been enjoyed for centuries. The combination of coffee and vodka creates a unique liqueur that can be enjoyed on its own or used in cocktails.
instructions: Boil water and sugar until dissolved.
Turn off heat and slowly add dry instant coffee, stirring continuously.
Add a chopped vanilla bean to the vodka.
Combine the cooled sugar syrup and coffee solution with the vodka.
Cover tightly and shake vigorously each day for 3 weeks.
Strain and filter the mixture.
Let the sugar mixture cool completely before adding to vodka to prevent evaporation.
Optionally, add about 5 ml of glycerine for a smoother feel.

name: Casino Royale
description: The Casino Royale is a classic cocktail that embodies the elegance and sophistication of the James Bond era. This drink combines the refreshing notes of gin and lemon with the unique sweetness of maraschino liqueur, creating a delightful balance that is both invigorating and indulgent. The addition of egg yolk adds a rich texture, making it a luxurious choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a sour glass.

name: Corpse Reviver
description: The Corpse Reviver is a classic cocktail that dates back to the early 20th century, often associated with the revival of spirits after a long night. This refreshing drink combines gin, triple sec, Lillet Blanc, and lemon juice, with a hint of absinthe for an aromatic finish. It was originally intended as a morning pick-me-up, but has since become a beloved staple in cocktail culture.
instructions: Rinse a cocktail glass with absinthe and discard the excess.
In a shaker, combine gin, triple sec, Lillet Blanc, lemon juice, and a dash of absinthe.
Shake well with ice.
Strain into the prepared cocktail glass.

name: Chocolate Milk
description: The Chocolate Milk is a fun and indulgent shot that combines the rich flavors of chocolate liqueur and creamy milk, topped with a hint of amaretto. This playful drink is perfect for parties and celebrations, offering a delightful twist on traditional shots. The layering of ingredients creates a visually appealing presentation, making it a favorite among dessert lovers.
instructions: Pour the milk into the bottom of the shot glass.
Carefully layer the chocolate liqueur on top of the milk.
Add a dash of amaretto on top.
Do not mix. SLAM IT!

name: Clove Cocktail
description: The Clove Cocktail is a classic drink that combines the herbal sweetness of sweet vermouth with the fruity notes of sloe gin and muscatel wine. This cocktail is a delightful representation of the early 20th-century cocktail culture, where vermouth-based drinks were all the rage. Its unique flavor profile makes it a sophisticated choice for any cocktail enthusiast.
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Coffee Liqueur
description: Coffee liqueur is a rich and flavorful spirit that combines the boldness of coffee with the sweetness of sugar and the warmth of vanilla. This delightful concoction has its roots in the coffee culture of the 20th century and has become a popular ingredient in cocktails and desserts alike. The process of making coffee liqueur involves simmering coffee, sugar, and water to create a syrup, which is then blended with vodka and aged for a few weeks to develop its complex flavors.
instructions: Combine coffee, sugar, and water in a pot.
Simmer the mixture for 1 hour and let it cool.
Add vanilla extract and vodka to the cooled mixture.
Transfer to a sealed jar and age for 2 to 3 weeks.

name: Coke and Drops
description: The Coke and Drops cocktail is a refreshing blend that combines the classic taste of Coca-Cola with a zesty twist from lemon juice. This simple yet delightful drink is perfect for those who enjoy a fizzy beverage with a hint of citrus. The addition of lemon juice not only enhances the flavor but also adds a touch of elegance when garnished with a lemon slice.
instructions: Take a cocktail glass.
Pour 100 ml of Coca-Cola into the glass.
Add 7 ml of lemon juice.
Garnish with a lemon slice on the rim of the glass.

name: Chocolate Drink
description: The Chocolate Drink is a comforting and indulgent beverage that has been enjoyed for centuries, originating from ancient Mesoamerican cultures where cacao was revered. This rich drink combines melted chocolate with creamy milk, creating a luscious treat perfect for warming up on a chilly day.
instructions: Melt the chocolate bar in a small amount of boiling water.
Add milk to the melted chocolate.
Cook over low heat, whipping gently until heated well. Do not let it boil!
Serve in a coffee mug.

name: Cranberry Punch
description: Cranberry Punch is a delightful and refreshing beverage that has been a staple at gatherings and celebrations. Its vibrant color and sweet-tart flavor make it a favorite for parties, especially during the holiday season. The combination of cranberry and pineapple juices, along with a hint of almond flavoring, creates a unique and festive punch that is sure to please a crowd.
instructions: Combine cranberry juice, sugar, pineapple juice, and almond flavoring in a large bowl.
Stir until the sugar is dissolved and chill the mixture.
Just before serving, add ginger ale to the punch.
Add an ice ring to keep the punch cold.

name: Derby
description: The Derby is a classic cocktail that dates back to the early 20th century, often associated with the Kentucky Derby horse race. This refreshing drink combines the herbal notes of gin with the subtle sweetness of peach bitters, making it a delightful choice for warm weather or any festive occasion.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice.
Stir.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with a sprig of fresh mint in the drink.

name: Diesel
description: The Diesel cocktail is a unique blend that combines the refreshing qualities of lager and cider with the rich, fruity notes of blackcurrant cordial. This drink is particularly popular in the UK, where it is often enjoyed in pubs. The combination of these ingredients creates a visually striking drink that resembles the dark color of a Guinness, making it a favorite among those who appreciate both flavor and aesthetics.
instructions: Pour the lager into the pint glass.
Add the blackcurrant cordial.
Top up with cider.

name: Daiquiri
description: The Daiquiri is a classic cocktail that originated in Cuba, named after a beach and a nearby village. It became popular in the early 20th century and is known for its refreshing combination of rum, lime juice, and sugar. This cocktail has been a favorite among many, including famous figures like Ernest Hemingway.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain in chilled cocktail glass.

name: Danbooka
description: The Danbooka is a unique concoction that combines the rich, robust flavor of coffee with the potent kick of Everclear. This drink is perfect for those looking to energize their evening with a spirited twist. The origins of this drink are rooted in the creative mixology of coffee cocktails, where caffeine meets alcohol for an invigorating experience.
instructions: Pour the coffee into a coffee mug.
Add Everclear to the coffee.
Mix well to combine the flavors.

name: Downshift
description: The Downshift cocktail is a vibrant and refreshing drink that combines the sweetness of fruit punch with the crispness of Sprite and the kick of tequila, topped off with a float of Bacardi 151 for an extra punch. This cocktail is perfect for summer gatherings or a fun night out, embodying the spirit of tropical flavors and lively celebrations.
instructions: Start with the Sprite.
Next comes the tequila.
After that, add the Minute Maid Fruit Punch.
Then float the Bacardi 151 on top.

name: Dragonfly
description: The Dragonfly cocktail is a refreshing highball that combines the botanical notes of gin with the spicy sweetness of ginger ale. This drink is perfect for warm weather and is often garnished with a lime wedge to enhance its zesty profile. Its origins can be traced back to the classic highball drinks that gained popularity in the early 20th century, showcasing the versatility of gin in mixed drinks.
instructions: In a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes, combine the gin and ginger ale.
Stir well.
Garnish with the lime wedge.

name: Dry Martini
description: The Dry Martini is a classic cocktail that has stood the test of time, often associated with sophistication and elegance. Its origins date back to the late 19th century, and it has been a favorite of many, including the iconic character James Bond. The balance of gin and dry vermouth creates a refreshing yet potent drink, often garnished with an olive or a twist of lemon peel.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Strain into a chilled martini cocktail glass.
Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with an olive.

name: Dry Rob Roy
description: The Dry Rob Roy is a classic cocktail that pays homage to the Rob Roy, a drink named after the Scottish folk hero. This variation uses dry vermouth instead of sweet, creating a drier and more sophisticated flavor profile. It's a favorite among those who appreciate the boldness of Scotch whisky balanced with the herbal notes of vermouth.
instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine the Scotch and dry vermouth.
Stir well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with the lemon twist.

name: Dirty Nipple
description: The Dirty Nipple is a fun and visually striking layered shot that combines the rich flavors of coffee liqueur, anise, and creamy Irish whiskey. This shot is perfect for parties and celebrations, showcasing the art of layering drinks for a stunning presentation.
instructions: Pour Kahlua into the shot glass until it is about one-third full.
Slowly layer Sambuca on top of the Kahlua by pouring it over the back of a spoon.
Finally, layer Baileys Irish Cream on top of the Sambuca using the same spoon technique.

name: Dirty Martini
description: The Dirty Martini is a classic cocktail that adds a savory twist to the traditional martini with the inclusion of olive brine. This drink has its roots in the early 20th century and has become a staple in cocktail culture, often enjoyed for its briny flavor and smooth finish. The addition of olive brine not only enhances the flavor but also gives the drink its characteristic 'dirty' appearance.
instructions: Pour the vodka, dry vermouth, and olive brine into a cocktail shaker with a handful of ice and shake well.
Rub the rim of a martini glass with the wedge of lemon.
Strain the contents of the cocktail shaker into the glass and add the olive.

name: Darkwood Sling
description: The Darkwood Sling is a delightful cocktail that showcases the rich flavors of cherry liqueur, balanced with the refreshing notes of soda and orange juice. Originating from the classic sling family of cocktails, this drink offers a modern twist that appeals to both traditionalists and adventurous drinkers alike.
instructions: Add 30 ml of Cherry Heering to the glass.
Add 30 ml of Soda water to the glass.
Add 30 ml of Orange juice to the glass.
Fill the glass with ice cubes.

name: Dark and Stormy
description: The Dark and Stormy is a classic cocktail that originated in Bermuda, combining the rich flavors of dark rum with the spicy zest of ginger beer. Traditionally garnished with a lime wedge, this drink is a refreshing choice for those who enjoy a bit of sweetness balanced with a hint of spice.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add 150 ml of dark rum.
Top with 300 ml of ginger beer.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Dark Caipirinha
description: The Dark Caipirinha is a Brazilian cocktail that takes the classic Caipirinha and adds a rich depth with demerara sugar. This drink celebrates the vibrant flavors of lime and the unique character of cachaça, a spirit made from fermented sugarcane juice. The muddling of sugar with lime releases essential oils and juices, creating a refreshing and invigorating experience.
instructions: Muddle the sugar into the lime wedges in a highball glass.
Fill the glass with ice cubes.
Pour the cachaça into the glass.
Stir well.

name: Duchamp's Punch
description: Duchamp's Punch is a refreshing cocktail that combines the vibrant flavors of Pisco with the tartness of lime and the sweetness of pineapple syrup. Named after the famous artist Marcel Duchamp, this cocktail embodies creativity and a playful spirit, making it a perfect choice for art lovers and cocktail enthusiasts alike.
instructions: Shake all ingredients.
Double strain in a chilled double old fashioned glass with a big ice cube.
Garnish with a couple of lavender sprigs.

name: Damned if you do
description: The 'Damned if you do' is a bold shot that combines the warmth of whiskey with the fiery sweetness of Hot Damn, a cinnamon schnapps. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a quick, spirited drink that packs a punch and warms the soul.
instructions: Pour whiskey into shot glass.
Add Hot Damn to the shot glass.
Put in mouth.
Repeat as deemed necessary.

name: Dubonnet Cocktail
description: The Dubonnet Cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the rich, herbal flavors of Dubonnet Rouge, a fortified wine that has been enjoyed since the 19th century. This cocktail combines the sweetness of Dubonnet with the botanical notes of gin, creating a balanced and sophisticated drink that is perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Stir all ingredients (except lemon peel) with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

name: Drinking Chocolate
description: Drinking chocolate has a rich history dating back to the ancient Mesoamerican cultures, where cacao was revered as a sacred drink. This luxurious beverage combines the creaminess of milk and cream with the deep flavors of dark chocolate, often enhanced with spices like cinnamon and vanilla. It's a comforting treat that warms the soul, perfect for chilly evenings or as a decadent dessert.
instructions: Heat the cream and milk with the cinnamon and vanilla bean very slowly for 15-20 minutes.
Remove the cinnamon stick and vanilla bean.
Add the finely chopped dark chocolate and mix until fully melted.
Serve topped with some very dense fresh whipped cream.

name: Death in the Afternoon
description: The Death in the Afternoon is a cocktail that combines the potent herbal flavors of absinthe with the effervescence of champagne. It is said to have been created by the famous American author Ernest Hemingway, who enjoyed this drink during his afternoons in Paris. The combination of these two ingredients creates a unique experience that is both refreshing and intoxicating.
instructions: Pour the absinthe into a chilled coupe glass.
Top with champagne.

name: Egg Cream
description: The Egg Cream is a classic New York City beverage that combines chocolate syrup, milk, and soda water. Despite its name, it contains neither egg nor cream. Originating in the Jewish communities of Brooklyn in the late 19th century, it has become a nostalgic treat for many, evoking memories of soda fountains and diners.
instructions: Mix chocolate syrup and whole milk in a glass.
Add soda water and stir gently.
Serve with a straw.

name: Egg Nog #4
description: Egg Nog is a classic holiday drink that dates back to the 14th century, originally made with milk, eggs, and spices. This rich and creamy version combines the flavors of rum and bourbon, making it a festive favorite during the winter months. Traditionally served in a punch bowl, it brings people together for celebration and cheer.
instructions: In a small mixer bowl, beat egg yolks until blended.
Gradually add 60 ml sugar, beating at high speed until thick and lemon colored.
Stir in 480 ml milk, followed by 120 ml light rum, 120 ml bourbon, vanilla extract, and salt.
Chill thoroughly.
Whip 240 ml cream.
Wash beaters well.
In a large mixer bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
Gradually add remaining 60 ml sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
Fold yolk mixture and whipped cream into egg whites.
Serve immediately, sprinkling nutmeg over each serving.

name: English Highball
description: The English Highball is a refreshing cocktail that combines the richness of brandy with the botanical notes of gin and the sweetness of vermouth, topped off with carbonated water. This drink is a classic example of the highball style, which emphasizes simplicity and balance. The addition of a lemon twist adds a zesty aroma, making it a delightful choice for any occasion.
instructions: Pour brandy, gin, and sweet vermouth into a highball glass over ice cubes.
Fill with carbonated water.
Add the twist of lemon peel.
Stir gently and serve.

name: Espresso Martini
description: The Espresso Martini is a modern classic that combines the rich flavors of coffee with the smoothness of vodka. Created in the 1980s by bartender Dick Bradsell in London, this cocktail was designed to provide a caffeine kick alongside a delightful buzz, making it a favorite among night owls and cocktail enthusiasts alike.
instructions: Pour ingredients into shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into chilled martini glass.

name: Espresso Rumtini
description: The Espresso Rumtini is a delightful fusion of rich espresso and smooth rum, creating a cocktail that is both invigorating and indulgent. This drink combines the bold flavors of coffee with the sweetness of vanilla, making it a perfect after-dinner treat. The addition of chocolate powder and coffee beans as garnish adds a touch of elegance and enhances the coffee aroma, making it a favorite among coffee lovers.
instructions: Combine the rum, vanilla syrup, espresso, and coffee in a shaker.
Shake well until chilled.
Strain into a chilled coupe glass.
Garnish with chocolate powder and coffee beans.

name: Egg Nog - Healthy
description: Egg Nog has a rich history dating back to the medieval period, originally enjoyed by the aristocracy. This healthier version substitutes traditional ingredients with lighter options, making it a delightful treat for the holiday season without the guilt.
instructions: Whip egg substitute and sugar together.
Combine with the two kinds of milk, vanilla, and rum.
Mix well.
Chill overnight.
Sprinkle with nutmeg before serving.

name: English Rose Cocktail
description: The English Rose Cocktail is a delightful blend of spirits that evokes the charm of classic cocktail culture. With its sweet and floral notes, this drink is perfect for those who appreciate a touch of elegance in their glass. The sugar-rimmed glass adds a playful sweetness that complements the sophisticated flavors of gin and apricot brandy.
instructions: Rub the rim of a coupe glass with lemon juice and dip the rim in powdered sugar.
Shake all ingredients (except cherry) with ice.
Strain the mixture into the sugar-rimmed glass.
Top with the cherry and serve.

name: Elderflower Caipirinha
description: The Elderflower Caipirinha is a delightful twist on the classic Brazilian cocktail, the Caipirinha. By incorporating elderflower cordial, this refreshing drink gains a floral sweetness that perfectly complements the tartness of lime and the unique flavor of cachaça. This cocktail is perfect for warm weather and brings a taste of the tropics to any gathering.
instructions: Take the glass and muddle the lime in it.
Fill the glass with crushed ice and add the Cachaca.
Stir well and top with some more crushed ice.
Garnish with lime and enjoy!

name: Egg-Nog - Classic Cooked
description: Eggnog has a rich history dating back to medieval Europe, where it was originally a drink for the wealthy, made with eggs, milk, and spices. This classic cooked version ensures a creamy, safe-to-consume beverage that has become a staple during the holiday season in many cultures.
instructions: In a large saucepan, beat together eggs, sugar, and salt, if desired.
Stir in 480 ml of the milk.
Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick enough to coat a metal spoon and reaches 71 degrees Celsius.
Remove from heat and stir in the remaining 480 ml of milk and vanilla.
Cover and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, several hours or overnight.
Just before serving, pour into a bowl or pitcher.
Garnish or add stir-ins as desired and serve immediately.

name: Empellón Cocina's Fat-Washed Mezcal
description: This unique cocktail showcases the rich flavors of fat-washed mezcal, a technique that infuses the spirit with the savory essence of pork fat. Originating from the culinary traditions of Mexico, this drink combines smoky mezcal with the sweetness of chocolate liqueur and a hint of heat from habanero tincture, creating a complex and delightful experience.
instructions: Combine mezcal and chocolate liqueur in a mixing glass with ice.
Stir for 45 seconds.
Strain into a chilled coupe.
Carefully 'sink' the coffee liqueur down the inside of the coupe over a spoon.
Garnish with 5 drops of habanero tincture.

name: Frosé
description: Frosé, a delightful frozen cocktail, combines the refreshing taste of rosé wine with the sweetness of strawberries and a hint of lemon. This slushy drink has gained popularity in recent years, especially during warm weather, as a perfect way to enjoy wine in a new, fun form. The process of freezing rosé and blending it with a strawberry syrup creates a unique texture and flavor profile that is both refreshing and indulgent.
instructions: Pour rosé into a 13x9" pan and freeze until almost solid, at least 6 hours.

Meanwhile, bring sugar and 120 ml water to a boil in a medium saucepan; cook, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves, about 3 minutes. Add strawberries, remove from heat, and let sit 30 minutes to infuse syrup with strawberry flavor. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; cover and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.

Scrape rosé into a blender. Add lemon juice, 105 ml strawberry syrup, and 240 ml crushed ice and purée until smooth. Transfer blender jar to freezer and freeze until frosé is thickened, 25–35 minutes.
Blend again until frosé is slushy. Divide among glasses.

name: Frappé
description: The Frappé is a refreshing coffee drink that originated in Greece, known for its frothy texture and invigorating taste. Traditionally enjoyed during warm weather, it combines coffee, milk, and sugar, creating a delightful beverage that can be sipped leisurely. The drink's unique frothiness is achieved through blending, making it a popular choice for coffee lovers seeking a cool treat.
instructions: Mix together the black coffee, milk, and sugar.
Blend at the highest blender speed for about 1 minute.
Pour into a highball glass and drink with a straw.

name: Foxy Lady
description: The Foxy Lady is a delightful cocktail that combines the nutty sweetness of Amaretto with the rich, chocolatey flavor of Creme de Cacao, all balanced by the creamy texture of light cream. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy dessert-like drinks and has a charming history tied to the playful and flirtatious spirit of the 1960s cocktail culture.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: French 75
description: The French 75 is a classic cocktail that dates back to World War I, named after the French 75mm field gun. This effervescent drink combines gin, lemon juice, and sugar, topped with Champagne, creating a refreshing and celebratory beverage that has stood the test of time.
instructions: Combine gin, sugar, and lemon juice in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake vigorously and strain into a chilled champagne glass.
Top up with Champagne and stir gently.

name: Figgy Thyme
description: The Figgy Thyme cocktail is a delightful blend of fresh figs and aromatic thyme, combined with honey vodka for a touch of sweetness. This refreshing drink is topped with tonic water, making it a perfect choice for warm evenings. The use of fresh ingredients and the unique flavor profile pays homage to the craft of mixology, where nature's bounty meets creative spirit.
instructions: In a lewis bag, crush up some ice.
Pour the crushed ice into a collins glass.
In a cocktail shaker, muddle the figs and thyme together.
Add honey vodka and lemon juice to the shaker, along with a large ice cube.
Shake until well chilled, and strain into the glass with ice.
Top with tonic water and add 2 dashes of angostura bitters.
Garnish with sliced figs and thyme.

name: Frisco Sour
description: The Frisco Sour is a delightful cocktail that combines the warmth of blended whiskey with the herbal complexity of Benedictine, balanced by the tartness of fresh citrus. This drink is a nod to the classic sour cocktails that have been enjoyed since the 19th century, showcasing the art of mixing spirits with fresh juices for a refreshing experience.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except slices of lemon and lime) with ice.
Strain into a whiskey sour glass.
Decorate with the slices of lemon and lime and serve.

name: Fruit Shake
description: The Fruit Shake is a delightful blend of creamy yogurt and fresh fruits, perfect for a refreshing treat. Originating from the trend of fruit smoothies in the 20th century, this shake combines the natural sweetness of bananas and oranges with the tangy flavor of yogurt, creating a nutritious and delicious beverage.
instructions: Combine the fruit yogurt, banana, frozen orange juice, and textural fruit in a blender.
Add ice and blend until smooth.

name: Fruit Cooler
description: The Fruit Cooler is a refreshing beverage that combines the sweetness of strawberries and apple juice with the tartness of lemon. This drink is perfect for warm days and is a great way to enjoy fresh fruits. The recipe has its roots in classic fruit punches, which have been enjoyed for centuries, often served at gatherings and celebrations.
instructions: Toss strawberries with sugar, and let sit overnight in refrigerator.
Cut lemon, reserve two slices. Juice the rest.
Mix together the lemon juice, strawberries, apple juice, and soda water.
Add slices of lemon for decoration.
In glasses, put ice cubes and a slice of apple.
Pour drink in, and serve.

name: Freddy Kruger
description: The Freddy Kruger is a bold shot that combines the herbal complexity of Jägermeister with the sweet anise flavor of Sambuca and the clean finish of vodka. This shot is perfect for those looking to embrace the spirit of Halloween or simply enjoy a unique blend of flavors in a single gulp.
instructions: Pour 15 ml of Jägermeister into a shot glass.
Add 15 ml of Sambuca.
Top with 15 ml of vodka.

name: Funk and Soul
description: The Funk and Soul cocktail is a vibrant and refreshing drink that captures the essence of Caribbean flavors with a twist of fruitiness. Originating from the fusion of classic rum cocktails, this drink is perfect for those looking to enjoy a taste of the tropics. The use of Jamaican rum adds authenticity, while the combination of apricot nectar and pomegranate juice provides a delightful sweetness and tartness.
instructions: Mix all ingredients together.
Strain into a Collins glass.
Top with soda water.

name: Fuzzy Asshole
description: The Fuzzy Asshole is a playful cocktail that combines the warmth of coffee with the fruity sweetness of Peach Schnapps. This unique drink is perfect for those who enjoy a comforting beverage with a twist, making it a fun choice for gatherings or a cozy night in.
instructions: Fill the coffee mug half full with hot coffee (approximately 120ml).
Fill the other half with Peach Schnapps (approximately 120ml).
Stir gently and enjoy while hot.

name: French Martini
description: The French Martini is a delightful cocktail that combines the smoothness of vodka with the fruity flavors of raspberry liqueur and pineapple juice. This drink gained popularity in the 1980s and is often associated with the glamorous nightlife of Paris. Its vibrant color and refreshing taste make it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice cubes.
Shake well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink.

name: French Negroni
description: The French Negroni is a delightful twist on the classic Negroni, substituting the traditional Campari with Lillet, a French aperitif. This variation offers a smoother, more floral profile while retaining the cocktail's signature bitterness. The drink is perfect for those who appreciate a sophisticated balance of flavors, making it a popular choice in cocktail bars around the world.
instructions: Add ice to a shaker and pour in all ingredients.
Using a bar spoon, stir 40 to 45 revolutions or until thoroughly chilled.
Strain into a martini glass or over ice into a rocks glass.
Garnish with orange twist.

name: Fahrenheit 5000
description: The Fahrenheit 5000 is a fiery shot that combines the heat of Tabasco sauce with the spicy kick of Firewater and the peppery notes of Absolut Peppar. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a bold and adventurous drinking experience, reminiscent of the spicy cocktails that emerged in the late 20th century as bartenders began to experiment with heat and flavor.
instructions: Cover the bottom of a shot glass with Tabasco sauce.
Fill the shot glass halfway with Firewater.
Top off the shot glass with Absolut Peppar.

name: Flying Dutchman
description: The Flying Dutchman is a classic cocktail that showcases the harmonious blend of gin and triple sec. This drink is reminiscent of the maritime legends of the Flying Dutchman ship, said to be doomed to sail the seas forever. Its crisp and refreshing profile makes it a timeless choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: In an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes, combine the gin and triple sec.
Stir well.

name: Frozen Daiquiri
description: The Frozen Daiquiri is a delightful twist on the classic cocktail, blending the refreshing flavors of lime and rum with a frosty texture. Originating in Cuba, this cocktail has become a favorite in tropical locales and is often enjoyed on warm days. The addition of triple sec adds a hint of sweetness, while the crushed ice creates a slushy consistency that is both fun and refreshing.
instructions: Combine all ingredients (except for the cherry) in an electric blender.
Blend at a low speed for five seconds.
Blend at a high speed until firm.
Pour contents into a champagne flute.
Top with the cherry and serve.

name: Fruit Flip-Flop
description: The Fruit Flip-Flop is a refreshing and creamy beverage that combines the tanginess of yogurt with the sweetness of fruit juice. This delightful concoction is perfect for warm days and is reminiscent of summer picnics. Blending these ingredients creates a smooth texture that is both satisfying and invigorating.
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar.
Cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour into one tall, two medium, or three small glasses and enjoy.

name: Flying Scotchman
description: The Flying Scotchman is a classic cocktail that beautifully marries the smoky notes of Scotch whisky with the herbal complexity of sweet vermouth. This drink is a nod to the era of cocktail innovation in the early 20th century, showcasing the balance of flavors that define many timeless recipes.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: French Connection
description: The French Connection is a classic cocktail that beautifully marries the rich flavors of Cognac and the sweet, nutty notes of Amaretto. This drink is said to have gained popularity in the 1970s, partly due to its mention in the film of the same name. It's a simple yet elegant concoction that showcases the depth of its ingredients.
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir gently.

name: Flaming Dr. Pepper
description: The Flaming Dr. Pepper is a daring cocktail that combines the sweetness of amaretto with the boldness of Bacardi 151, creating a drink that is both flavorful and visually striking. Traditionally served in a Collins glass, this cocktail is often ignited before serving, adding an element of excitement to any gathering. The drink's name pays homage to the popular soft drink, Dr. Pepper, which adds a unique twist to the mix.
instructions: Add Amaretto, Bacardi, and vodka into a Collins glass.
Top with Dr. Pepper and beer.
Carefully ignite the Bacardi 151 on top before serving.

name: Flaming Lamborghini
description: The Flaming Lamborghini is a visually stunning cocktail that combines the rich flavors of coffee liqueur and anise with the creamy texture of Baileys and the vibrant color of Blue Curacao. This drink is designed to be consumed quickly through a straw while on fire, creating a thrilling experience for adventurous drinkers. Its origins are often attributed to the flamboyant cocktail culture of the 1980s and 1990s, where showmanship and spectacle were key elements of the drinking experience.
instructions: Pour the Sambuca and Kahlua into the cocktail glass.
Place the Baileys and Blue Curacao into two separate shot glasses on either side of the cocktail glass.
Light the concoction in the cocktail glass.
Drink through the straw quickly.
As you reach the bottom of the glass, pour the Baileys and Blue Curacao into the cocktail glass to extinguish the fire and continue drinking until it's all gone.

name: Flander's Flake-Out
description: The Flander's Flake-Out is a whimsical cocktail that combines the anise-flavored liqueur Sambuca with the sweet, rooty notes of Sarsaparilla. This drink is a nod to the playful side of mixology, perfect for those looking to explore unique flavor combinations. The use of a Collins glass adds a refreshing touch, making it ideal for warm evenings.
instructions: Pour 75 ml of Sambuca into the Collins glass.
Add 225 ml of Sarsaparilla to the glass.

name: Frozen Mint Daiquiri
description: The Frozen Mint Daiquiri is a refreshing twist on the classic daiquiri, combining the bright flavors of lime and mint with the smoothness of light rum. This cocktail is perfect for warm weather, offering a cool and invigorating experience. The use of crushed ice gives it a slushy texture, making it a delightful choice for summer gatherings.
instructions: Combine all ingredients with 240 ml of crushed ice in an electric blender.
Blend at a low speed for a short length of time.
Pour into an old-fashioned glass and serve.

name: Frozen Pineapple Daiquiri
description: The Frozen Pineapple Daiquiri is a tropical twist on the classic daiquiri, blending the sweetness of fresh pineapple with the zesty brightness of lime juice. This refreshing cocktail is perfect for warm weather and evokes the laid-back vibes of beachside bars. The use of crushed ice gives it a slushy texture, making it a delightful treat on a hot day.
instructions: Combine all ingredients with 240 ml of crushed ice in an electric blender.
Blend at a low speed for a short length of time.
Pour into a cocktail glass and serve.

name: GG
description: The GG cocktail is a refreshing drink that combines the herbal sweetness of Galliano with the spicy effervescence of ginger ale. This simple yet delightful concoction is perfect for warm days and casual gatherings, showcasing the unique flavor profile of Galliano, a liqueur that has been enjoyed since the early 20th century.
instructions: Pour the Galliano liqueur over ice.
Fill the remainder of the glass with ginger ale.

name: Gimlet
description: The Gimlet is a classic cocktail that dates back to the late 19th century, originally created as a way to prevent scurvy among sailors by mixing gin with lime juice. Its crisp and refreshing flavor has made it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Add all the ingredients to a shaker and fill with ice.
Shake, and strain into a chilled cocktail glass or an Old Fashioned glass filled with fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

name: Godchild
description: The Godchild cocktail is a delightful blend of vodka, amaretto, and heavy cream, creating a rich and creamy drink that is both indulgent and refreshing. This cocktail is often served in a champagne flute, making it a perfect choice for celebrations or special occasions.
instructions: Shake all ingredients well with cracked ice.
Strain into a champagne flute.
Serve.

name: Gin Fizz
description: The Gin Fizz is a classic cocktail that dates back to the late 19th century, known for its refreshing qualities and effervescence. It combines the botanical flavors of gin with the tartness of lemon juice and a touch of sweetness from powdered sugar, topped off with bubbly soda water. This cocktail is a favorite for its simplicity and invigorating taste, making it a staple in bars around the world.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice cubes, except soda water.
Pour into glass.
Top with soda water.

name: Gin Sour
description: The Gin Sour is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 19th century, showcasing the refreshing combination of gin and citrus. This drink is a delightful balance of tartness from the lemon juice and sweetness from the sugar, making it a perfect choice for warm weather or any occasion that calls for a refreshing sip.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, lemon juice, and superfine sugar.
Shake well until chilled.
Strain into a rocks glass.
Garnish with an orange slice and a maraschino cherry.

name: Gagliardo
description: The Gagliardo is a delightful cocktail that combines the fruity essence of peach vodka with the tartness of lemon juice, complemented by the herbal notes of Galliano and the floral sweetness of rose syrup. This cocktail hails from the American/Internet Bar del Pozzo in Pavia, Italy, showcasing a blend of flavors that is both refreshing and aromatic.
instructions: Combine peach vodka, lemon juice, Galliano, and rose syrup in a shaker.
Shake well to mix and chill the ingredients.
Strain into a chilled coupe glass and serve.

name: Godmother
description: The Godmother cocktail is a delightful blend of vodka and amaretto, offering a smooth and slightly sweet flavor profile. This drink is a variation of the classic Godfather, substituting vodka for whiskey, making it a popular choice for those who prefer a lighter spirit. Its origins can be traced back to the mid-20th century, reflecting the cocktail culture's evolution during that time.
instructions: Pour vodka and amaretto into an old-fashioned glass over ice.
Serve immediately.

name: Godfather
description: The Godfather cocktail is a classic drink that combines the smoky flavors of Scotch whisky with the sweet, nutty notes of Amaretto. This cocktail is said to have been popularized in the 1970s, possibly inspired by the iconic film of the same name. It's a simple yet sophisticated drink that appeals to both whisky lovers and those who enjoy a sweeter profile.
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir gently.

name: Gluehwein
description: Gluehwein, or mulled wine, is a traditional German beverage enjoyed during the winter months, especially around Christmas. It combines red wine with various spices and citrus, creating a warm, aromatic drink that is perfect for cold evenings. The process of mulling wine dates back centuries, with roots in ancient Rome, where wine was often spiced and heated for health benefits and enjoyment.
instructions: Boil sugar and spices in water, leave in the water for 30 minutes.
Strain the spiced water and mix with the wine.
Heat slowly until short of boiling temperature.
To remove alcohol, let it boil for a while.
You may add lemon or orange juice to taste.
Serve in an Irish coffee cup.

name: Gin Tonic
description: The Gin Tonic is a classic cocktail that has been enjoyed for centuries, originating from the British colonial era when gin was mixed with tonic water to combat malaria. This refreshing drink combines the botanical flavors of gin with the crispness of tonic water, making it a favorite for warm weather and social gatherings.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour the gin over the ice.
Top with tonic water.
Squeeze a lemon wedge over the drink and garnish with another lemon wedge.

name: Gin Toddy
description: The Gin Toddy is a delightful twist on the classic hot toddy, traditionally made with whiskey. This refreshing cocktail combines the botanical notes of gin with the sweetness of powdered sugar and a hint of citrus from lemon peel. It's a perfect drink for those who enjoy a lighter, more aromatic beverage.
instructions: Mix powdered sugar and water in an old-fashioned glass.
Add gin and one ice cube.
Stir, add the twist of lemon peel, and serve.

name: Gin Smash
description: The Gin Smash is a refreshing cocktail that dates back to the 19th century, combining the botanical flavors of gin with the sweetness of sugar and the freshness of mint. This drink is a delightful way to enjoy gin, especially during warm weather, and showcases the classic technique of muddling to release the flavors of fresh ingredients.
instructions: Muddle sugar with carbonated water and mint sprigs in an old-fashioned glass.
Add gin and 1 ice cube.
Stir, add the orange slice and the cherry, and serve.

name: Gin Daisy
description: The Gin Daisy is a classic cocktail that dates back to the late 19th century, showcasing the refreshing combination of gin and citrus. This drink is a delightful balance of sweet and tart flavors, making it a perfect choice for warm weather or any festive occasion. The addition of grenadine adds a beautiful hue and a touch of sweetness, while the garnish of cherry and orange slice enhances its visual appeal.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, lemon juice, sugar, and grenadine.
Shake well.
Pour into an old-fashioned glass and garnish with the cherry and the orange slice.

name: Gin Lemon
description: The Gin Lemon is a refreshing cocktail that combines the crispness of gin with the tartness of lemon juice, making it a perfect drink for warm weather. This cocktail is simple yet elegant, often garnished with a slice of lemon and sometimes enhanced with fresh mint leaves for an aromatic touch. Its origins can be traced back to classic gin cocktails, where the bright flavors of citrus were used to complement the botanicals in gin.
instructions: Fill the highball glass with ice cubes.
Pour the gin and lemon juice over the ice.
Gently mix the ingredients.
Garnish with a slice of lemon and optionally add mint leaves.

name: Gin Sling
description: The Gin Sling is a refreshing cocktail that combines the botanical notes of gin with the tartness of lemon and the sweetness of sugar. This drink has its roots in the classic sling family of cocktails, which date back to the 19th century. The addition of orange peel adds a fragrant twist, making it a delightful choice for warm weather.
instructions: Dissolve powdered sugar in a mixture of water and lemon juice.
Add gin to the mixture.
Pour into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes.
Stir gently.
Add a twist of orange peel and serve.

name: Greyhound
description: The Greyhound is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 1920s, originally served in a highball glass. It combines the clean, crisp flavor of vodka with the tartness of grapefruit juice, making it a refreshing choice for warm weather. The drink's name is said to be inspired by the Greyhound bus line, symbolizing speed and travel.
instructions: Add the vodka to a Collins glass filled with ice.
Top with grapefruit juice and stir.

name: Gin Rickey
description: The Gin Rickey is a classic cocktail that dates back to the late 19th century, named after Colonel Joe Rickey, a Washington D.C. lobbyist. This refreshing drink combines the crispness of gin with the tartness of citrus and a splash of soda, making it a perfect thirst-quencher for warm days.
instructions: Half-fill a tall glass with ice.
Mix the gin and grenadine together and pour over the ice.
Add the lime or lemon juice.
Top off with soda water.
Decorate the glass with lime and/or lemon slices.

name: Gin Squirt
description: The Gin Squirt is a refreshing cocktail that combines the botanical notes of gin with the sweetness of grenadine and powdered sugar, topped off with bubbly carbonated water. This drink is perfect for warm days and is often garnished with fresh fruit, adding a tropical flair to its presentation.
instructions: Stir gin, grenadine, and powdered sugar with ice.
Strain into a highball glass over ice cubes.
Fill with carbonated water and stir.
Decorate with pineapple chunks and strawberries, then serve.

name: Grand Blue
description: The Grand Blue is a vibrant cocktail that combines the tropical flavors of Malibu rum and peach schnapps with the striking color of Blue Curacao. This refreshing drink is perfect for summer gatherings or beach parties, evoking the essence of a sunny day by the ocean.
instructions: Pour the Malibu rum into the old fashioned glass.
Add the peach schnapps.
Pour in the Blue Curacao.
Top with sweet and sour mix.

name: Gin Cooler
