description: Planter's Punch is a classic Caribbean cocktail that embodies the vibrant flavors of tropical fruits and rum. Originating in the 19th century, it has become a staple in tiki culture and is celebrated for its refreshing taste and colorful presentation. The combination of dark rum, citrus juices, and orgeat syrup creates a delightful balance of sweetness and acidity, making it a perfect drink for warm weather.
instructions: Pour all ingredients, except the bitters, into a shaker filled with ice.
Shake well.
Pour into a large glass filled with ice.
Add Angostura bitters on top.
Garnish with a cocktail cherry and pineapple.

name: Pineapple Paloma
description: The Pineapple Paloma is a tropical twist on the classic Paloma cocktail, which traditionally features tequila and grapefruit juice. This refreshing drink combines the zesty flavors of lime and grapefruit with the sweetness of pineapple, making it a perfect choice for warm weather. The salted rim adds a savory contrast that enhances the overall experience.
instructions: Rub the rim of each glass with a lime slice and dip into salt.
Add ice to the glass.
Pour in the tequila, grapefruit juice, and fresh lime juice.
Top with pineapple soda.
Give it a quick stir.
Garnish with fresh pineapple or lime.

name: Pornstar Martini
description: The Pornstar Martini is a modern classic cocktail that emerged in the early 2000s, known for its vibrant flavors and playful presentation. It combines the tropical notes of passion fruit with the smoothness of vodka, creating a delightful balance that is both refreshing and indulgent. Traditionally served with a shot of prosecco on the side, this cocktail has become a favorite in bars around the world.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice cubes.
Shake well.
Strain into a chilled martini cocktail glass.
Cut passion fruit in half and use as garnish.
Pour prosecco into a chilled shot glass and serve alongside the martini.

name: Planter’s Punch
description: Planter’s Punch is a classic Caribbean cocktail that embodies the vibrant flavors of tropical fruits and rum. Originating in the 19th century, it has become a staple in tiki culture and is celebrated for its refreshing taste and colorful presentation. Traditionally served in a highball glass, this punch is perfect for warm weather and festive gatherings.
instructions: Squeeze an orange and strain the juice.
Put all the ingredients in a shaker filled with ice.
Shake for at least 12 seconds.
Strain into a highball glass.
Decorate with a pineapple wedge or fruit of your choice.

name: Port And Starboard
description: The Port And Starboard cocktail is a visually striking drink that showcases the art of layering. Traditionally served in a pousse café glass, this cocktail features the vibrant red of grenadine and the lush green of crème de menthe, creating a beautiful contrast that is as delightful to look at as it is to sip. This drink is a testament to the creativity of mixologists who enjoy crafting visually appealing cocktails.
instructions: Pour grenadine into the bottom of a pousse-cafe glass.
Carefully layer the green crème de menthe on top of the grenadine by pouring it slowly over the back of a spoon.

name: Port Wine Cocktail
description: The Port Wine Cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the rich, sweet flavors of port wine, complemented by the warmth of brandy. This cocktail has its roots in the 19th century, when fortified wines were popular in mixed drinks, offering a delightful balance of sweetness and complexity.
instructions: Stir ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Psych Vitamin Light
description: The Psych Vitamin Light is a refreshing cocktail that combines the vibrant flavors of orange, apple, and pineapple juices. This drink is perfect for those looking for a fruity and revitalizing beverage, often enjoyed during warm weather or as a healthy alternative at brunch. The combination of these juices not only provides a burst of flavor but also a wealth of vitamins, making it a popular choice for health-conscious drinkers.
instructions: Combine orange juice, apple juice, and pineapple juice in a shaker.
Shake well with ice until chilled.
Strain into a Collins glass filled with ice.

name: Pink Panty Pulldowns
description: The Pink Panty Pulldowns is a playful and refreshing cocktail that has gained popularity in summer parties and gatherings. Its vibrant pink color and sweet, citrusy flavor make it a favorite among those looking for a fun and easy-to-drink beverage. The combination of vodka and pink lemonade creates a delightful balance, while the addition of Sprite adds a fizzy twist.
instructions: Combine vodka, pink lemonade, and Sprite in a shaker.
Shake well to mix the ingredients thoroughly.
Pour into a Collins glass filled with ice.

name: Passion Fruit Martini
description: The Passion Fruit Martini is a vibrant and tropical cocktail that combines the smoothness of vodka with the sweet and tangy flavors of passion fruit. This cocktail has gained popularity in modern cocktail culture, often enjoyed for its refreshing taste and eye-catching presentation. The addition of sugar syrup balances the tartness of the passion fruit, making it a delightful choice for any occasion.
instructions: Pour vodka, sugar syrup, and passion fruit juice into a mixing glass.
Stir gently to combine the ingredients.
Strain into a chilled coupe glass.
Garnish with half a passion fruit piece.

name: Pineapple Gingerale Smoothie
description: The Pineapple Gingerale Smoothie is a refreshing blend that combines the tropical sweetness of pineapple with the spicy kick of ginger. This smoothie is perfect for hot summer days or as a revitalizing drink any time of the year. The combination of flavors not only tantalizes the taste buds but also offers a burst of vitamins and minerals.
instructions: Peel and chop the pineapple into smaller pieces.
Peel and slice the ginger.
Add the pineapple and ginger to a blender.
Blend until smooth and liquified.

name: Quentin
description: The Quentin cocktail is a delightful blend of dark rum, Kahlua, and cream, creating a rich and indulgent drink. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and creamy experience, with a hint of nutmeg to elevate the flavors. Its origins are rooted in the classic cocktail movement, where the combination of spirits and liqueurs with cream became a popular choice for dessert-like drinks.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the dark rum, Kahlua, and light cream.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with grated nutmeg.

name: Queen Bee
description: The Queen Bee cocktail is a delightful blend of coffee brandy and lime vodka, with a touch of cream sherry that adds a unique depth. This cocktail, with its intriguing combination of flavors, is perfect for those who appreciate a sweet yet tangy drink. The use of coffee brandy brings a rich, aromatic quality, while the lime vodka adds a refreshing zest, making it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Quick F**K
description: The Quick F**K is a playful layered shot that combines the rich coffee flavor of Kahlua, the sweet and fruity notes of Midori, and the creamy texture of Baileys Irish Cream. This vibrant shot is perfect for parties and celebrations, showcasing a beautiful gradient of colors that tantalizes the eyes as much as the taste buds.
instructions: In a shot glass, add 30ml of Kahlua first.
Then, carefully layer 30ml of Midori on top.
Finally, top it off with 30ml of Baileys Irish Cream.

name: Quick-sand
description: The Quick-sand cocktail is a refreshing blend that combines the herbal notes of black sambuca with the vibrant sweetness of orange juice. This drink is perfect for those who enjoy a fruity cocktail with a hint of anise, and the addition of pulp gives it a delightful texture. Its origins are rooted in the desire for a quick and easy drink that doesn't compromise on flavor.
instructions: Pour 250 ml of orange juice into a highball glass.
Add 25 ml of black sambuca to the orange juice.
Stir gently to mix the sambuca with the orange juice, ensuring the pulp is well distributed.

name: Queen Charlotte
description: The Queen Charlotte cocktail is a refreshing blend that pays homage to the elegance of the British monarchy. Named after Queen Charlotte, the wife of King George III, this drink combines the rich flavors of red wine with the sweetness of grenadine and the effervescence of lemon-lime soda, making it a delightful choice for any occasion.
instructions: Pour red wine and grenadine into a Collins glass over ice cubes.
Fill with lemon-lime soda, stir, and serve.

name: Queen Elizabeth
description: The Queen Elizabeth cocktail is a classic drink that embodies the elegance and sophistication of its namesake. This cocktail combines the herbal notes of dry vermouth with the botanicals of gin and the unique sweetness of Benedictine, creating a balanced and refined beverage that has stood the test of time.
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Quaker's Cocktail
description: The Quaker's Cocktail is a classic drink that combines the smoothness of light rum and brandy with the tartness of lemon and the sweetness of raspberry syrup. This cocktail reflects the innovative spirit of the early 20th century, where bartenders experimented with various ingredients to create balanced and refreshing drinks.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Quarter Deck Cocktail
description: The Quarter Deck Cocktail is a classic drink that embodies the spirit of nautical adventures. With its refreshing lime and the unique flavor of cream sherry, this cocktail is a delightful tribute to the sea and the sailors who navigated it. The combination of light rum and sherry creates a harmonious balance, making it a perfect choice for warm evenings.
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Rose
description: The Rose cocktail is a classic drink that beautifully balances the herbal notes of dry vermouth with the botanical flavors of gin and the sweetness of apricot brandy and grenadine. This cocktail has a rich history, often associated with the elegance of the early 20th century cocktail culture, making it a timeless choice for any occasion.
instructions: Shake together dry vermouth, gin, apricot brandy, lemon juice, and grenadine in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a chilled coupe glass.
Garnish and serve.

name: Radler
description: The Radler is a refreshing German beverage that combines beer with a citrus soda, traditionally enjoyed during warm weather. Its origins date back to the early 20th century when a Bavarian innkeeper created it for cyclists ('Radler' means 'cyclist' in German) to quench their thirst without getting too intoxicated.
instructions: Pour beer into a highball glass.
Slowly add the 7-Up (or Sprite).

name: Rum Sour
description: The Rum Sour is a delightful twist on the classic sour cocktail, blending the smoothness of light rum with the tartness of fresh lemon juice. This refreshing drink has its roots in the early 20th century, showcasing the versatility of rum in cocktail culture. Traditionally served in a whiskey sour glass, it is often garnished with a slice of orange and a maraschino cherry, adding a touch of color and flavor.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the light rum, lemon juice, and superfine sugar.
Shake well to mix and chill the ingredients.
Strain into a rocks glass and garnish with an orange slice and a maraschino cherry.

name: Rum Punch
description: Rum Punch is a classic party drink that combines the tropical flavors of rum with the refreshing zest of fruit juices and ginger ale. This delightful concoction has roots in Caribbean culture, where it is often enjoyed during celebrations and gatherings. Its vibrant colors and fruity taste make it a favorite for summer parties and festive occasions.
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Serve chilled over crushed ice.

name: Rum Toddy
description: The Rum Toddy is a classic warm cocktail that combines the rich flavors of rum with the sweetness of sugar and the refreshing zest of lemon. Traditionally enjoyed as a comforting drink, it has roots in the early 19th century when hot drinks were popular for their soothing properties. This cocktail is perfect for chilly evenings or as a delightful after-dinner treat.
instructions: Dissolve powdered sugar in water in an old-fashioned glass.
Add rum and one ice cube and stir.
Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

name: Royal Fizz
description: The Royal Fizz is a delightful cocktail that combines the refreshing qualities of gin with the richness of egg, creating a frothy and invigorating drink. This cocktail is a variation of the classic fizz, which has its roots in the 19th century, known for its effervescence and lively character. The addition of cola adds a unique twist, making it a modern favorite.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except cola) with ice and strain into a chilled collins glass.
Fill with cola and serve.

name: Rum Cooler
description: The Rum Cooler is a refreshing cocktail that combines the smoothness of rum with the zesty flavors of lemon-lime soda. This drink is perfect for warm weather and is often enjoyed at beach parties or backyard barbecues. Its origins can be traced back to the classic highball cocktails, where spirits are mixed with soda for a light and effervescent experience.
instructions: Fill a Collins glass almost to the top with ice cubes.
Pour the rum over the ice.
Add the lemon-lime soda.
Stir well to combine.
Garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Rum Runner
description: The Rum Runner is a tropical cocktail that originated in the Florida Keys during the 1950s. It was named after the rum runners who smuggled alcohol during Prohibition. This vibrant drink combines the flavors of rum and various fruit juices, making it a refreshing choice for warm weather.
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a cocktail glass.
Add ice.

name: Rusty Nail
description: The Rusty Nail is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 1930s, combining the smoky flavors of Scotch whisky with the sweet, herbal notes of Drambuie. This drink is often enjoyed as a warming nightcap, perfect for sipping by the fire.
instructions: Pour the Scotch and Drambuie into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Garnish with the lemon twist.

name: Red Snapper
description: The Red Snapper is a delightful cocktail that combines the smoothness of Crown Royal with the sweet nuttiness of Amaretto and the tartness of cranberry juice. This vibrant drink is perfect for those who enjoy a balanced flavor profile and a touch of sweetness. Its origins are often debated, but it has become a popular choice in bars and gatherings alike.
instructions: Combine Crown Royal, Amaretto, and Cranberry juice in a shaker.
Shake well to mix the ingredients thoroughly.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass filled with ice.

name: Royal Bitch
description: The Royal Bitch is a layered shot that combines the nutty sweetness of Frangelico with the smoothness of Crown Royal. This visually striking shot is perfect for celebrations and adds a touch of elegance to any gathering. The contrasting flavors create a delightful experience for the palate.
instructions: Pour Frangelico into a shot glass as the base layer.
Carefully layer Crown Royal on top of the Frangelico.

name: Royal Flush
description: The Royal Flush is a vibrant cocktail that combines the smoothness of Crown Royal Canadian whisky with the fruity flavors of peach schnapps, Chambord raspberry liqueur, and cranberry juice. This cocktail is a favorite for its refreshing taste and colorful presentation, making it a popular choice at parties and gatherings.
instructions: Pour all the ingredients into a tumbler over ice.
Strain into the glass.

name: Rum Cobbler
description: The Rum Cobbler is a refreshing cocktail that dates back to the 19th century, showcasing the versatility of rum. Originally popular in the southern United States, this drink combines the sweetness of sugar and fruit with the effervescence of club soda, making it a delightful choice for warm weather.
instructions: In an old-fashioned glass, dissolve the sugar in the club soda.
Add crushed ice until the glass is almost full.
Add the dark rum.
Stir well.
Garnish with the cherry and the orange and lemon slices.

name: Ruby Tuesday
description: The Ruby Tuesday cocktail is a refreshing blend of gin and cranberry juice, with a touch of grenadine for sweetness. This vibrant drink is perfect for any occasion, evoking the spirit of casual gatherings and summer evenings. Its bright color and crisp flavor make it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Pour gin and cranberry juice into a highball glass filled with ice cubes.
Add grenadine and stir gently.

name: Rail Splitter
description: The Rail Splitter is a refreshing cocktail that combines the sweetness of sugar syrup with the tartness of lemon juice, topped off with the effervescence of ginger ale. This drink is a nod to the rustic charm of the American frontier, evoking images of log cabins and the great outdoors.
instructions: Mix sugar syrup with lemon juice in a tall glass.
Fill up with ginger ale.

name: Rosemary Blue
description: The Rosemary Blue is a refreshing cocktail that combines the botanical notes of gin with the vibrant color of Blue Curacao, enhanced by the aromatic essence of rosemary. This drink is perfect for summer evenings, offering a delightful balance of flavors and a stunning visual appeal.
instructions: Add the Bombay Sapphire, Blue Curacao, rosemary sprig and gently squeezed lemon wedge to a balloon glass. Swirl well to combine.
Fill with cubed ice and top with the Fever-Tree Light Tonic Water.
Gently fold with a bar spoon to mix.

name: Ramos Gin Fizz
description: Ramos Gin Fizz was once drunk as an invigorating drink or even as a breakfast, try it as an aperitif and after dinner and you will discover a little gem now lost.
instructions: Prepare all the ingredients on the counter to be able to work well and quickly, especially the cream and egg white.
Pour all the ingredients into a shaker.
Shake vigorously for 1 minute: cream and egg white must be mixed perfectly, so don't rush.
Now open the shaker and put some ice and shake for 1-2 minutes.
Pour into a highball glass, add a splash of soda and garnish to taste.

name: Royal Gin Fizz
description: The Royal Gin Fizz is a classic cocktail that dates back to the late 19th century, known for its refreshing and effervescent qualities. This drink combines the botanical notes of gin with the tartness of lemon and the richness of egg, creating a delightful balance of flavors. The addition of carbonated water gives it a lively finish, making it a perfect choice for warm weather or festive occasions.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice.
Strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes.
Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

name: Rum Milk Punch
description: Rum Milk Punch is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 18th century, combining the smoothness of light rum with the creamy texture of milk. Traditionally enjoyed during festive occasions, this drink is often garnished with a sprinkle of nutmeg, adding a warm spice that complements the sweetness of the punch. Its rich history and delightful flavor make it a timeless favorite.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice.
Strain into a Collins glass.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Raspberry Julep
description: The Raspberry Julep is a refreshing twist on the classic Mint Julep, incorporating the sweet and tart flavors of raspberries. This cocktail is perfect for warm weather, offering a delightful balance of minty freshness and fruity sweetness. Traditionally served in a cordial glass, it showcases the vibrant colors of its ingredients and is garnished with a sprig of mint for an aromatic finish.
instructions: Softly muddle the mint leaves and raspberry syrup in the bottom of the cup.
Add crushed ice and Bourbon to the cup and then stir.
Top with more ice and garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Rum Screwdriver
description: The Rum Screwdriver is a tropical twist on the classic screwdriver cocktail, which traditionally features vodka. This refreshing drink combines the smoothness of light rum with the vibrant citrus notes of orange juice, making it a perfect choice for warm weather or a casual gathering. The origins of the screwdriver date back to the 1940s, but the addition of rum gives it a unique flair that transports you to a beachside paradise.
instructions: Pour light rum into a highball glass over ice cubes.
Add orange juice.
Stir gently and serve.

name: Raspberry Cooler
description: The Raspberry Cooler is a refreshing cocktail that combines the fruity essence of raspberry vodka with the effervescence of lemon-lime soda. This drink is perfect for warm days and casual gatherings, offering a delightful balance of sweetness and tartness. Its vibrant color and refreshing taste make it a popular choice among summer cocktails.
instructions: Fill a highball glass almost to the top with ice cubes.
Pour the raspberry vodka over the ice.
Add the lemon-lime soda.
Stir well to combine the ingredients.

name: Rum Old-fashioned
description: The Rum Old-fashioned is a tropical twist on the classic Old-fashioned cocktail, traditionally made with whiskey. This version incorporates light rum and a touch of high-proof rum for an added kick, while the bitters and sugar provide a balanced sweetness. The twist of lime peel adds a refreshing citrus aroma, making it a delightful drink for rum enthusiasts.
instructions: Stir powdered sugar, water, and bitters in an old-fashioned glass until the sugar has dissolved.
Add ice cubes to the glass.
Pour in the light rum.
Add the twist of lime peel.
Float the 151 proof rum on top and serve.

name: Russian Spring Punch
description: The Russian Spring Punch is a refreshing cocktail that combines the boldness of vodka with the sweetness of crème de cassis and the tartness of lemon juice, topped off with sparkling wine. This cocktail is a delightful nod to the classic punch, offering a vibrant and effervescent experience perfect for spring gatherings.
instructions: Pour the vodka, crème de cassis, sugar syrup, and lemon juice into a highball glass.
Top with sparkling wine.

name: Radioactive Long Island Iced Tea
description: The Radioactive Long Island Iced Tea is a vibrant twist on the classic Long Island Iced Tea, featuring a colorful mix of spirits and liqueurs that create a visually striking and flavorful cocktail. This drink is known for its potent combination of alcohol and sweet flavors, making it a favorite among adventurous cocktail enthusiasts. The addition of Chambord and Midori gives it a unique fruity profile, while the various spirits provide a robust backbone.
instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a very tall glass.
Sip cautiously.

name: Smut
description: The Smut cocktail is a playful blend of fruity and fizzy flavors, combining the richness of red wine with the sweetness of peach schnapps, the refreshing taste of Pepsi Cola, and the citrusy zing of orange juice. This drink is perfect for those looking for a unique and refreshing beverage to enjoy on a warm day.
instructions: Combine red wine, peach schnapps, Pepsi Cola, and orange juice in a mixing glass.
Stir gently to mix the ingredients.
Serve in a chilled highball glass.

name: Spritz
description: The Spritz is a classic Italian cocktail that originated in the Veneto region. It combines the refreshing qualities of Prosecco with the bitter notes of Campari, making it a perfect aperitif. Traditionally enjoyed in the summer, this vibrant drink is often garnished with an orange slice or an olive, adding a touch of elegance to its presentation.
instructions: Fill an Old-Fashioned glass with ice.
Pour in the Prosecco and Campari.
Add a splash of soda water.
Garnish as desired and serve.

name: Scooter
description: The Scooter is a delightful cocktail that combines the rich flavors of brandy and amaretto with the smoothness of light cream. This creamy concoction is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and indulgent drink, often served in elegant settings. Its origins are somewhat obscure, but it reflects the classic cocktail culture of the mid-20th century, where creamy cocktails gained popularity.
instructions: Shake all ingredients well with cracked ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Sangria
description: Sangria is a traditional Spanish punch that combines red wine with a variety of fruits, spices, and sometimes liqueurs. Its origins can be traced back to the 18th century, and it has become a popular beverage worldwide, especially during warm weather. The addition of spices like cloves and cinnamon adds depth and warmth to this refreshing drink.
instructions: Mix all ingredients together in a pitcher.
Refrigerate to chill.
Add cloves and cinnamon sticks to taste.
Serve in wine glasses.

name: Stinger
description: The Stinger is a classic cocktail that dates back to the early 20th century, often associated with the post-Prohibition era. It combines the warmth of brandy with the refreshing minty notes of white crème de menthe, making it a delightful after-dinner drink. Traditionally served in a cocktail glass, it can also be enjoyed on the rocks for a more casual experience.
instructions: Pour brandy and white crème de menthe into a mixing glass with ice.
Stir well to chill the mixture.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Sazerac
description: The Sazerac is a classic cocktail that originated in New Orleans in the 19th century. It is known for its unique combination of flavors, featuring the herbal notes of absinthe and the sweetness of sugar, balanced by the boldness of bourbon. Traditionally served in an old-fashioned glass, this cocktail is a true representation of the city's rich cocktail culture.
instructions: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe.
Add crushed ice to the glass and set it aside.
Stir the remaining ingredients (Ricard, sugar, Peychaud bitters, water, and bourbon) over ice in a mixing glass.
Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass.
Strain the drink into the glass.
Add the lemon peel for garnish.

name: Sidecar
description: The Sidecar is a classic cocktail that dates back to World War I, believed to have originated in either Paris or London. This refreshing drink combines the rich flavors of Cognac with the citrusy brightness of lemon juice and the sweetness of Cointreau, making it a timeless favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and strain into a cocktail glass.

name: Snowday
description: The Snowday cocktail is a delightful blend of spirits that evokes the warmth of a cozy winter day. With the smoothness of vodka, the herbal complexity of Amaro Montenegro, and the rich sweetness of Ruby Port, this drink is perfect for sipping by the fire. The addition of blood orange and a hint of Angostura bitters adds a refreshing twist, making it a unique choice for any occasion.
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled rocks glass over fresh ice.
Express orange peel over drink and garnish.

name: Spice 75
description: The Spice 75 is a delightful twist on the classic French 75, incorporating a spiced syrup that adds warmth and complexity to the cocktail. Originating from the cocktail renaissance, this drink combines the effervescence of champagne with the rich flavors of rum and lime, making it a perfect choice for festive occasions.
instructions: Gently warm 60g golden caster sugar in a pan with 30ml water and 1ml allspice. Cook gently until the sugar has dissolved, then leave the mixture to cool.
Strain through a sieve lined with a coffee filter (or a double layer of kitchen paper).
Pour 60ml of the spiced syrup into a cocktail shaker along with 200ml rum and 90ml lime juice.
Shake with ice and strain between six flute glasses.
Top up with 600ml champagne and garnish each with an orange twist.

name: Snowball
description: The Snowball is a classic cocktail that combines the rich, creamy texture of Advocaat with the refreshing fizz of lemonade. Originating in the UK, this drink became popular in the 1970s and is often associated with festive occasions. Its bright, cheerful appearance and zesty lemon garnish make it a delightful choice for any gathering.
instructions: Place one ice cube in the glass.
Add 45 ml of Advocaat.
Fill up the glass with approximately 240 ml of cold lemonade.
Decorate with a slice of lemon.
Serve at once.

name: Shot-gun
description: The Shot-gun is a bold and spirited cocktail that combines the rich flavors of three iconic American whiskeys. This layered shot is perfect for those who appreciate the distinct profiles of Jack Daniels, Jim Beam, and Wild Turkey, creating a unique tasting experience that celebrates the heritage of American whiskey distillation.
instructions: Pour 30 ml of Jack Daniels into a shot glass.
Pour 30 ml of Jim Beam into the shot glass.
Float 30 ml of Wild Turkey on top.

name: Salty Dog
description: The Salty Dog is a refreshing cocktail that combines the tartness of grapefruit juice with the botanical notes of gin, creating a delightful balance of flavors. Traditionally served in a highball glass, this drink is often enjoyed on warm days, making it a popular choice for summer gatherings. The addition of salt enhances the citrus notes, giving it a unique twist.
instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice cubes in a highball glass.
Stir well and serve.

name: Stone Sour
description: The Stone Sour is a classic cocktail that combines the fruity flavors of apricot brandy and orange juice with the tartness of sweet and sour mix. This drink has its roots in the whiskey sour family, showcasing the versatility of fruit liqueurs in cocktails. It is a refreshing choice for those who enjoy a balance of sweet and tangy flavors.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled whiskey sour glass.
Serve.

name: Sea Breeze
description: The Sea Breeze is a refreshing cocktail that emerged in the 1920s and gained popularity in the 1970s. It combines the crispness of vodka with the tartness of cranberry and grapefruit juices, making it a perfect drink for warm weather. The cocktail is often associated with beach vacations and sunny days, embodying a laid-back, coastal lifestyle.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the vodka, cranberry juice, and grapefruit juice.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Scotch Sour
description: The Scotch Sour is a delightful twist on the classic sour cocktail, combining the rich flavors of Scotch whisky with the tartness of lime juice and the sweetness of powdered sugar. This cocktail showcases the versatility of Scotch, making it a refreshing choice for whisky lovers. The addition of a lemon slice and cherry not only enhances the presentation but also adds a hint of citrus aroma, making each sip a delightful experience.
instructions: Shake Scotch, lime juice, and powdered sugar with ice.
Strain into a whiskey sour glass.
Decorate with 1/2 slice lemon and top with the cherry.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: The Sweet Tooth cocktail is a delightful blend of rich chocolate liqueur and creamy milk, creating a dessert-like drink that satisfies any sweet craving. Originating from the trend of dessert cocktails, this drink is perfect for those who enjoy indulgent flavors in a refreshing format.
instructions: Put 60 ml of Godiva liqueur into a highball glass.
Add approximately 240 ml of milk, or to taste.

name: Screwdriver
description: The Screwdriver is a classic cocktail that combines vodka and orange juice, creating a refreshing and easy-to-make drink. Its origins date back to the 1940s, when American oil workers in the Persian Gulf would mix their vodka with orange juice using a screwdriver as a stirring tool. This simple yet effective cocktail has since become a staple in bars around the world.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour 60 ml of vodka over the ice.
Top with orange juice to taste.
Garnish and serve.

name: Sherry Flip
description: The Sherry Flip is a classic cocktail that combines the rich flavors of cream sherry with the creamy texture of light cream and egg. This delightful drink dates back to the 19th century and showcases the versatility of sherry in cocktails. Traditionally served in a Nick and Nora glass, it is garnished with a sprinkle of nutmeg, adding a warm spice that complements the drink's sweetness.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice.
Strain into a Nick and Nora glass.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Sol Y Sombra
description: The English translation of the name of this drink is 'Sun and Shade', and after sampling this drink, you'll understand why. This cocktail combines the rich, warming qualities of brandy with the sweet, herbal notes of anisette, creating a delightful balance that reflects its name.
instructions: Shake ingredients with ice.
Strain into a brandy snifter.
Serve.

name: Shark Attack
description: The Shark Attack cocktail is a refreshing and vibrant drink that combines the zesty flavor of lemonade with the smoothness of vodka. Perfect for summer gatherings, this cocktail is known for its fun and playful presentation, often served in a pitcher for sharing. The combination of lemonade and vodka creates a delightful balance of sweetness and tartness, making it a favorite among party-goers.
instructions: Mix lemonade and water according to instructions on back of can.
If the instructions say to add 130 ml of water, do so.
Mix into pitcher.
Add 450 ml of Vodka (Absolut).
Mix well.
Pour into glass of crushed ice.

name: San Francisco
description: The San Francisco cocktail is a vibrant and fruity drink that captures the essence of the city’s lively spirit. With its layers of flavors and colors, this cocktail is not only refreshing but also visually stunning, making it a perfect choice for summer gatherings or festive occasions.
instructions: Take a tall glass and put in a few ice cubes.
Pour the vodka over the ice.
Fill the glass with orange juice.
Add the crème de banane carefully.
Slowly pour in the grenadine along the side of the glass to create a layered effect.
Garnish with an orange slice and a strawberry.

name: Space Odyssey
description: The Space Odyssey cocktail is a vibrant and tropical drink that takes you on a flavor journey through the cosmos. Combining the boldness of Bacardi 151 with the sweetness of Malibu rum and refreshing pineapple juice, this cocktail is topped with orange juice and a splash of grenadine for a stunning visual effect. Garnished with cherries, it’s a perfect drink for summer parties or a night of stargazing.
instructions: Fill the highball glass with ice.
Pour in 30 ml of Bacardi 151 proof rum.
Add 30 ml of Malibu rum.
Add 30 ml of pineapple juice.
Top with approximately 90 ml of orange juice.
Add a splash of grenadine for color.
Garnish with cherries.

name: Sherry Eggnog
description: Sherry Eggnog is a delightful twist on the classic eggnog, incorporating the rich flavors of cream sherry. This festive drink has roots in traditional holiday celebrations, where eggnog was often spiced and served to warm the spirits during winter gatherings. The addition of sherry adds a unique depth, making it a perfect choice for cozy evenings.
instructions: Shake sherry, powdered sugar, and egg with ice.
Strain into a Collins glass.
Fill with milk and stir.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

name: Sweet Bananas
description: The Sweet Bananas cocktail is a delightful blend of creamy milk and ripe bananas, sweetened with honey. This refreshing drink is perfect for warm days and brings a taste of tropical bliss to your glass. Its origins can be traced back to the trend of fruit-based cocktails that gained popularity in the mid-20th century, celebrating the natural sweetness of fruits.
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar.
Cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour into one tall, two medium, or three small glasses and enjoy.

name: Sweet Sangria
description: Sweet Sangria is a refreshing and fruity beverage that has its roots in Spain, where it is traditionally made with red wine and a variety of fruits. This delightful drink is perfect for summer gatherings and parties, offering a vibrant mix of flavors that can be customized with seasonal fruits. The addition of soda, like Fresca, adds a fizzy twist, making it a popular choice for those looking to enjoy a light and refreshing cocktail.
instructions: Dissolve the sugar in hot water and cool.
Peel the citrus fruits and break them into wedges.
Mix the wine, sugar syrup, fruit, and Fresca in a pitcher.
Put the mixture in the fridge for a few hours.
Serve in tall glasses with a straw.

name: Thriller
description: The Thriller cocktail is a classic concoction that combines the smoky richness of Scotch with the sweet and spicy notes of green ginger wine, balanced by the refreshing acidity of orange juice. This drink is perfect for those who enjoy a complex flavor profile that dances on the palate.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients.
Shake well.
Strain into a cocktail glass.

name: The Galah
description: The Galah is a vibrant cocktail that combines the rich flavors of dark rum and the bittersweet notes of Campari, balanced by the tropical sweetness of pineapple and the tartness of lime juice. This cocktail is a nod to the colorful Australian bird, the Galah, known for its lively personality and striking appearance.
instructions: Mix together the dark rum, Campari, and creme de banane in a shaker.
Pour the mixture into a Collins glass filled with ice.
Top with pineapple juice and lime juice to fill the glass.

name: Tia-Maria
description: Tia Maria is a coffee liqueur originating from Jamaica, known for its rich flavor profile that combines coffee, vanilla, and rum. The recipe is said to have been created by a young woman named Tia Maria who used her family's secret recipe to craft this delightful liqueur. Traditionally enjoyed on its own or in cocktails, Tia Maria has become a staple in bars around the world.
instructions: Boil water, brown sugar, and coffee for 10 minutes and let cool.
Add rum and vanilla extract to the cooled mixture.
Put the mixture in clean bottle(s) and leave for 1 week before using.

name: Tipperary
description: The Tipperary cocktail is a classic drink that showcases the harmonious blend of Irish whiskey, sweet vermouth, and the herbal complexity of Green Chartreuse. Named after the Irish county, this cocktail has roots in the early 20th century and reflects the rich tradition of whiskey cocktails. Its vibrant flavors and aromatic finish make it a delightful choice for any occasion.
instructions: Stir over ice.
Strain into chilled glass.
Cut a wide swath of orange peel, and express the orange oils over the drink.
Discard orange twist.

name: Turkeyball
description: The Turkeyball is a playful shot that combines the boldness of Wild Turkey bourbon with the sweet, nutty flavor of amaretto and a hint of tropical pineapple juice. This cocktail is perfect for parties and celebrations, offering a delightful balance of flavors that will surprise and delight your taste buds.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a shot glass.

name: Texas Sling
description: The Texas Sling is a delightful blend of rich liqueurs and cream, creating a smooth and indulgent cocktail that is perfect for dessert or a special occasion. Its origins are rooted in the creative cocktail culture of Texas, where bold flavors and innovative combinations are celebrated.
instructions: Blend all ingredients with ice until smooth.
Serve in a tulip glass and top with whipped cream.

name: Thai Coffee
description: Thai Coffee is a delightful beverage that combines the rich flavors of brewed coffee with aromatic spices like coriander and cardamom. This unique preparation method allows the cream to float beautifully on top, creating a visually stunning drink that is as enjoyable to look at as it is to sip. The use of spices reflects the vibrant culinary traditions of Thailand, where coffee is often infused with local flavors.
instructions: Place the coffee and spices in the filter cone of your coffee maker.
Brew coffee as usual and let it cool.
In a tall glass, dissolve 30 ml of sugar in 30 ml of the coffee.
Add 150 grams of ice cubes to the glass.
Pour the brewed coffee into the glass to within about 2.5 cm of the top.
Rest a spoon on top of the coffee and slowly pour whipping cream into the spoon to make it float.

name: Tom Collins
description: The Tom Collins is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 19th century. Named after a fictitious character, it became popular in the United States during the 1870s. This refreshing drink combines gin, lemon juice, sugar, and club soda, making it a perfect thirst-quencher for warm weather.
instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, lemon juice, and superfine sugar.
Shake well.
Strain into a Collins glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Add the club soda.
Stir and garnish with the maraschino cherry and the orange slice.

name: Tomato Tang
description: The Tomato Tang is a refreshing and zesty drink that highlights the vibrant flavors of ripe tomatoes, complemented by the acidity of lemon juice and a hint of savory celery salt. This cocktail is perfect for warm days or as a unique brunch offering, showcasing the versatility of tomatoes beyond the kitchen.
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar.
Cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour into one tall, two medium, or three small glasses and drink up.

name: Talos Coffee
description: Talos Coffee is a delightful blend of rich coffee and the citrusy sweetness of Grand Marnier, a French orange liqueur. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a warm, comforting drink with a hint of sophistication. Traditionally served in a brandy snifter, it allows the aromas to be fully appreciated, making it a favorite among coffee and liqueur enthusiasts alike.
instructions: Add 90 ml of Grand Marnier to the glass.
Pour in 30 ml of hot coffee.

name: Tennessee Mud
description: Tennessee Mud is a delightful cocktail that combines the rich flavors of coffee with the smoothness of Jack Daniels and the sweetness of Amaretto, topped with a creamy finish. This drink is perfect for cozy evenings or as a dessert cocktail, offering a warm and indulgent experience.
instructions: Pour 240 ml of hot coffee into a highball glass.
Add 120 ml of Jack Daniels.
Mix in 120 ml of Amaretto.
Top with whipped cream to taste.

name: Tequila Fizz
description: The Tequila Fizz is a refreshing cocktail that combines the bold flavors of tequila with the tartness of lemon juice and the sweetness of grenadine. This drink is a delightful twist on the classic fizz, showcasing the versatility of tequila in mixed drinks. The addition of egg white gives it a frothy texture, making it a visually appealing and delicious choice for any occasion.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except ginger ale) with ice and strain into a collins glass over ice cubes.
Fill with ginger ale, stir, and serve.

name: Tequila Sour
description: The Tequila Sour is a delightful twist on the classic sour cocktail, showcasing the vibrant flavors of tequila combined with the tartness of fresh lemon juice. This cocktail has roots in the early 20th century, where tequila began to gain popularity outside of Mexico. The addition of powdered sugar balances the acidity, creating a refreshing drink perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Shake tequila, juice of lemon, and powdered sugar with ice.
Strain into a whiskey sour glass.
Garnish with half-slice of lemon and top with a cherry.

name: Thai Iced Tea
description: Thai Iced Tea is a popular beverage in Thailand, known for its vibrant orange color and unique flavor profile. Traditionally made with strong brewed tea, it is sweetened with condensed milk and served over ice, making it a refreshing treat in the hot climate. The addition of mint leaves as a garnish adds a fragrant touch to this delightful drink.
instructions: Combine Thai tea powder and boiling water in a bowl, stirring until blended.
Add sweetened condensed milk and mix well.
Pour the mixture into two tall glasses filled with ice cubes.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves.

name: The Last Word
description: The Last Word is a classic cocktail that dates back to the Prohibition era, originally served at the Detroit Athletic Club. This vibrant green drink combines equal parts of gin, lime juice, Green Chartreuse, and Maraschino liqueur, creating a perfectly balanced and refreshing libation that has seen a resurgence in popularity in recent years.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Turf Cocktail
description: The Turf Cocktail is a classic drink that dates back to the late 19th century, often enjoyed by the elite at horse racing events. Its combination of dry vermouth and gin, accented by the unique flavor of anis and a hint of bitters, creates a refreshing yet complex cocktail that has stood the test of time.
instructions: Stir all ingredients (except orange peel) with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add the twist of orange peel and serve.

name: The Laverstoke
description: The Laverstoke is a refreshing cocktail that combines the floral notes of elderflower with the botanical complexity of gin, creating a delightful drink perfect for warm weather. The addition of ginger ale adds a spicy effervescence, while the lime and mint provide a refreshing finish. This cocktail is a nod to the art of mixology, showcasing how simple ingredients can come together to create a sophisticated beverage.
instructions: Squeeze two lime wedges into a balloon glass then add the elderflower cordial, Bombay Sapphire gin, and MARTINI Rosso Vermouth, swirl to mix.
Fully fill the glass with cubed ice and stir to chill.
Top with Fever-Tree Ginger Ale and gently stir again to combine.
Garnish with a snapped ginger slice and an awoken mint sprig.

name: Tequila Slammer
description: The Tequila Slammer is a lively cocktail that combines the bold flavors of tequila with the refreshing fizz of a lemon-lime soda. Originating in the 1970s, this drink became popular in bars and parties for its fun presentation and the excitement of the carbonation. The drink is typically served in a hurricane glass, where the carbonation creates a lively effect as it is mixed.
instructions: Pour 30 ml of tequila into a hurricane glass.
Add 30 ml of 7-Up to the glass.
Mix carefully to avoid releasing the dissolved CO2.

name: Tequila Sunrise
description: The Tequila Sunrise is a classic cocktail that originated in the 1970s, known for its vibrant colors resembling a sunrise. It combines the bold flavors of tequila with the sweetness of orange juice and grenadine, creating a visually stunning drink that is both refreshing and easy to make.
instructions: Pour the tequila and orange juice into the glass over ice.
Add the grenadine, which will sink to the bottom.
Stir gently to create the sunrise effect.
Garnish and serve.

name: The Philosopher
description: The Philosopher is a refreshing cocktail that combines the botanical notes of gin with the sweetness of melon liqueur, balanced by the citrusy brightness of lemon juice and the effervescence of Prosecco. This drink is a modern twist on classic flavors, perfect for those who appreciate a thoughtful sip.
instructions: Add all the spirits, orange bitters, and lemon juice into a shaker.
Shake well to combine the ingredients.
Strain the mixture into a coupe glass.
Top with Prosecco.

name: Tuxedo Cocktail
description: The Tuxedo Cocktail is a classic drink that embodies the elegance of the early 20th century cocktail culture. It combines the herbal notes of dry vermouth with the botanical flavors of gin, enhanced by the subtle sweetness of maraschino liqueur and the unique flavor of anis. This cocktail is often garnished with a cherry and a twist of lemon zest, making it a sophisticated choice for any occasion.
instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Garnish with a cherry and a twist of lemon zest.

name: Tequila Surprise
description: The Tequila Surprise is a bold and spicy shot that combines the smoothness of tequila with the fiery kick of Tabasco sauce. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a little heat with their spirits, making it a popular choice in bars and parties. The combination of flavors creates a surprising and delightful experience for the palate.
instructions: Fill the shot glass with tequila.
Add about 8 drops of Tabasco sauce.

name: Thai Iced Coffee
description: Thai Iced Coffee is a delightful beverage that combines the rich flavors of strong coffee with the aromatic essence of cardamom and the creaminess of milk. This drink is a popular choice in Thailand, where coffee is often enjoyed with a unique twist of spices and sweeteners, creating a refreshing and indulgent experience.
instructions: Prepare a pot of coffee at a good European strength.
In the ground coffee, add 2 or 3 freshly ground cardamom pods.
Sweeten the coffee while hot, then cool it quickly.
Serve the coffee in a highball glass over ice.
To achieve a layered effect, place a spoon atop the coffee and pour the cream carefully into the spoon so that it floats on top.

name: The Jimmy Conway
description: The Jimmy Conway is a delightful cocktail that combines the smoothness of Irish whiskey with the sweet, nutty flavor of Amaretto, balanced by the tartness of cranberry juice. Named after the iconic character from the film 'Goodfellas', this drink embodies a blend of sophistication and approachability, making it a perfect choice for any occasion.
instructions: Fill glass with ice.
Pour in The Irishman and Disaronno.
Fill to the top with Cranberry Juice.
Garnish with a slice of lemon…Enjoy!

name: Texas Rattlesnake
description: The Texas Rattlesnake is a bold cocktail that combines the sweetness of fruit liqueurs with the distinctive flavors of Southern Comfort and Yukon Jack. This drink is known for its sweet initial taste followed by a sharp bite, reminiscent of the rattlesnake itself. A perfect blend for those who enjoy a spirited kick in their cocktails.
instructions: Combine Yukon Jack, Cherry brandy, Southern Comfort, and sweet and sour in a shaker.
Shake well to mix the ingredients thoroughly.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice.

name: Vesper
description: The Vesper Martini, famously introduced by Ian Fleming in his James Bond novel 'Casino Royale', is a sophisticated cocktail that combines gin, vodka, and Lillet Blanc. This drink is known for its crisp and refreshing profile, making it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Shake over ice until well chilled.
Strain into a deep goblet.
Garnish with a thin slice of lemon peel.

name: Victor
description: The Victor is a classic cocktail that showcases the harmonious blend of gin, sweet vermouth, and brandy. This drink dates back to the early 20th century and is a testament to the elegance of pre-Prohibition cocktails, often enjoyed in sophisticated settings.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Vampiro
description: The Vampiro is a vibrant cocktail that blends the bold flavors of tequila with the refreshing zest of citrus and the savory notes of tomato juice. Originating from Mexico, this drink is often enjoyed as a lively accompaniment to festive gatherings, embodying the spirit of celebration and flavor. The unique combination of ingredients, including the rim of kosher salt, enhances the overall experience, making it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Rim the glass with kosher salt by moistening the rim with lime juice and dipping it into the salt.
Fill half the glass with ice.
Add 180 ml of high-quality tequila.
Squeeze fresh lime juice into the glass.
Add a few grains of salt.
Top off the glass with citrus-flavored soda until it is 320 ml full.
Add spicy Viuda de Sanchez or a mix of orange juice, lime juice, and pico de gallo.
Stir the ingredients to blend the flavors.

name: Vesuvio
description: The Vesuvio is a classic cocktail that combines the refreshing qualities of light rum with the sweetness of vermouth and the tartness of lemon juice. Its origins are somewhat murky, but it is believed to have been popularized in the mid-20th century, embodying the vibrant spirit of tropical cocktails. The addition of egg white gives it a silky texture and a frothy top, making it a delightful drink for any occasion.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes.
Serve.

name: Veteran
description: The Veteran cocktail is a classic blend that showcases the rich flavors of dark rum and the sweet, fruity notes of cherry brandy. This drink is a nod to the timeless appeal of rum-based cocktails, often enjoyed by those who appreciate a robust and flavorful experience. The combination of these spirits creates a harmonious balance, making it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Pour the dark rum and cherry brandy into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well to combine the flavors.

name: Van Vleet
description: The Van Vleet is a delightful cocktail that combines the smoothness of light rum with the rich sweetness of maple syrup and the tartness of lemon juice. This refreshing drink is perfect for those who enjoy a balance of flavors, and it pays homage to classic cocktail traditions with its simple yet effective ingredient list.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes.
Serve.

name: Vodka Fizz
description: The Vodka Fizz is a refreshing cocktail that combines the smoothness of vodka with the creamy texture of half-and-half and the tangy sweetness of limeade. This drink is perfect for warm days and is often enjoyed as a light, fizzy treat. The addition of nutmeg on top adds a unique aromatic twist, making it a delightful choice for those looking to explore new flavors.
instructions: Blend all ingredients except nutmeg.
Pour into a large white wine glass.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top.

name: Vodka Lemon
description: The Vodka Lemon is a refreshing cocktail that combines the crispness of vodka with the tartness of lemon juice, making it a perfect drink for warm weather. This cocktail is often enjoyed in highball glasses, allowing for a generous mix of ingredients and ice, creating a delightful and invigorating experience.
instructions: Put 6-7 ice cubes in the glass.
Pour the vodka and lemon juice into the glass.
Mix with a bar spoon.
Decorate with a slice of lemon and add mint leaves if desired.

name: Vodka Slime
description: The Vodka Slime is a refreshing cocktail that combines the crispness of vodka with the citrusy zing of lime and the effervescence of 7-Up. This drink is perfect for summer gatherings or a casual night in, offering a delightful balance of flavors that are both invigorating and easy to enjoy. Its vibrant green hue and bubbly texture make it a fun choice for any occasion.
instructions: Fill glass with ice.
Add vodka.
Pour in 7-Up.
Finish with lime juice.

name: Vodka Tonic
description: The Vodka Tonic is a classic cocktail that embodies simplicity and refreshment. Originating in the 19th century, it became popular among British officers in India who mixed gin with tonic water to combat malaria. Today, vodka has taken the spotlight, offering a smooth and clean base that pairs perfectly with the crispness of tonic water and the zesty brightness of citrus.
instructions: Wash and cut 1 wedge and 1 slice of lime or lemon.
Fill a tumbler with fresh ice.
Pour the desired dose of vodka and top up with the tonic.
Squeeze the lime wedge into the glass and decorate with the slice.

name: Vodka Martini
description: The Vodka Martini is a classic cocktail that has become synonymous with sophistication and elegance. Originating in the late 19th century, it gained immense popularity in the 20th century, particularly through its association with the fictional spy James Bond. This cocktail is known for its crisp and clean flavor, making it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Shake the vodka and dry vermouth together with a number of ice cubes.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Add the olive and serve.

name: Vodka Russian
description: The Vodka Russian is a refreshing cocktail that combines the clean taste of vodka with the effervescence of Schweppes Russchian, a unique Russian-style soda. This drink is perfect for warm days and casual gatherings, embodying the spirit of easy drinking and social enjoyment.
instructions: Pour 60 ml of vodka into a Collins glass.
Top with Schweppes Russchian to taste, filling the glass to approximately 300 ml.

name: Vermouth Cassis
description: The Vermouth Cassis is a refreshing cocktail that combines the herbal notes of dry vermouth with the sweet, fruity flavor of crème de cassis. This drink is a delightful example of how vermouth can be used in a highball format, offering a light and effervescent experience perfect for warm weather or as an aperitif.
instructions: Stir dry vermouth and crème de cassis in a highball glass with ice cubes.
Fill with carbonated water, stir again, and serve.

name: Victory Collins
description: The Victory Collins is a refreshing twist on the classic Tom Collins, incorporating the vibrant flavors of grape juice and a hint of sweetness from powdered sugar. This cocktail celebrates the spirit of victory with its bright and invigorating taste, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Shake all ingredients (except orange slice) with ice.
Strain into a collins glass over ice cubes.
Add the slice of orange and serve.

name: Vodka And Tonic
description: The Vodka and Tonic is a classic highball cocktail that combines the clean, crisp taste of vodka with the refreshing effervescence of tonic water. This drink has been a favorite for many due to its simplicity and versatility, making it a staple in bars around the world.
instructions: Pour vodka into a highball glass over ice cubes.
Fill with tonic water, stir, and serve.

name: Valencia Cocktail
description: The Valencia Cocktail is a delightful blend that showcases the vibrant flavors of apricot and orange, reminiscent of sunny Spanish afternoons. This cocktail, with its fruity notes and refreshing character, has been a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts since its inception in the early 20th century.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Whisky Mac
description: The Whisky Mac is a classic cocktail that combines the robust flavors of Scotch whisky with the spicy sweetness of green ginger wine. Originating in the early 20th century, this drink is a favorite among whisky enthusiasts and is often enjoyed as a warming beverage during colder months.
instructions: Pour the Scotch into the Collins glass.
Add the green ginger wine.

name: White Lady
description: The White Lady is a classic cocktail that dates back to the early 20th century, often associated with the Savoy Cocktail Book. This elegant drink combines gin, triple sec, and lemon juice, creating a refreshing and balanced flavor profile that has stood the test of time.
instructions: Add all ingredients into a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Shake well and strain into a large cocktail glass.

name: Wine Punch
description: Wine Punch is a refreshing and fruity beverage that has been enjoyed for centuries, often served at gatherings and celebrations. This delightful mix combines the rich flavors of red wine with the zesty brightness of citrus and tropical juices, making it a perfect choice for warm weather or festive occasions.
instructions: Combine all of the ingredients in a large pitcher.
Pour the mixture over a block of ice in a Collins glass.

name: Wine Cooler
description: The Wine Cooler is a refreshing cocktail that combines the elegance of wine with the effervescence of soda. Originating in the 1970s, this drink became popular for its light and fruity flavor, making it a perfect choice for warm weather gatherings.
instructions: Mix wine and soft drink.
Pour into glass.
Add ice.

name: Winter Rita
description: The Winter Rita is a seasonal twist on the classic margarita, incorporating the bitter notes of Campari and the aromatic essence of rosemary. This cocktail balances the bright acidity of lime and orange juices with the warmth of tequila, making it a refreshing yet complex drink perfect for winter gatherings.
instructions: Salt rim of the highball glass.
Combine tequila, Campari, lime juice, orange juice, and rosemary syrup in a shaker.
Shake with ice until well chilled.
Strain over fresh ice in the prepared glass.

name: Whiskey Sour
description: The Whiskey Sour is a classic cocktail that dates back to the 1860s, embodying the perfect balance of sweet and sour flavors. Traditionally made with whiskey, lemon juice, and sugar, this drink has evolved over the years, often garnished with a cherry and a slice of lemon. Its refreshing taste makes it a favorite among cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Shake blended whiskey, lemon juice, and powdered sugar with ice.
Strain into a chilled old-fashioned glass filled with ice if served on the rocks.
Garnish with a cherry and a half slice of lemon.

name: White Russian
description: The White Russian is a classic cocktail that gained immense popularity in the late 20th century, particularly after its feature in the cult film 'The Big Lebowski'. This creamy concoction combines the robust flavors of coffee liqueur with the smoothness of vodka, topped off with a splash of light cream for a rich finish.
instructions: Pour vodka and coffee liqueur over ice cubes in an old-fashioned glass.
Fill with light cream and serve.

name: Winter Paloma
description: Everyone’s favourite Paloma gets a delicious Indian makeover. Tequila reposado infused with “Timur Pepper” which has citrusy & grapefruit notes and is grown at the foothills of Himalaya. It also produces a slightly numbing and tingling sensation on your lip when consumed. We have also spiced up the fresh grapefruit juice with the warming spice blend from Himalaya. The combination of all these interesting elements has allowed us to elevate your Paloma sipping experience.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in 60 ml of tequila reposado.
Add the juice of 1 lime (approximately 30 ml).
Add 15 ml of agave syrup.
Top with grapefruit juice (approximately 150 ml).
Add a dash of pepper to taste.

name: White Wine Sangria
description: White Wine Sangria is a refreshing and fruity beverage that originated in Spain. Traditionally made with red wine, this variation uses white wine for a lighter taste, perfect for warm weather gatherings. The addition of fresh fruits and a splash of soda water makes it a delightful choice for summer parties.
instructions: Chop the lemon, lime, and other fruits into large chunks.
Fill the pitcher with the white wine.
Mix in the apple brandy.
Top to taste with soda water.

name: Whitecap Margarita
description: The Whitecap Margarita is a delightful twist on the classic margarita, incorporating the creamy sweetness of coconut cream. This refreshing cocktail is perfect for warm weather, evoking the essence of tropical beaches. Blending the ingredients creates a smooth and frothy texture, making it a favorite among those who enjoy a creamy cocktail experience.
instructions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Waikiki Beachcomber
description: The Waikiki Beachcomber is a delightful cocktail that captures the essence of tropical paradise. Originating from the mid-20th century, this drink combines the refreshing flavors of gin and triple sec with the sweetness of pineapple juice, making it a perfect choice for summer gatherings or a relaxing evening by the beach.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve.

name: Yellow Bird
description: The Yellow Bird is a classic cocktail that dates back to the mid-20th century, known for its vibrant color and tropical flavors. It combines the sweetness of Galliano and Triple Sec with the tartness of lime juice, creating a refreshing drink that transports you to a sunny beach with every sip.
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Yoghurt Cooler
description: The Yoghurt Cooler is a refreshing beverage that combines the creamy texture of yoghurt with the vibrant flavors of fresh fruit. Perfect for hot days, this drink is not only delicious but also nutritious, making it a popular choice for those looking to cool down while enjoying a healthy treat. The method of blending ensures a smooth consistency, while the addition of ice creates a frosty delight.
instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar.
Cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended.
Pour into one tall, two medium, or three small glasses.
For added ice, remove the center of the cover while the blender is on, drop in 3 or 4 ice cubes, and blend until completely crushed.

name: Zorro
description: The Zorro cocktail is a delightful blend of rich flavors, combining the anise notes of Sambuca, the creamy sweetness of Baileys Irish Cream, and the refreshing minty essence of White Creme de Menthe. Traditionally served in a coffee mug, this drink is perfect for those who enjoy a warm, comforting beverage with a twist.
instructions: Add Sambuca, Baileys Irish Cream, and White Creme de Menthe into a coffee mug.
Pour hot black coffee into the mug until nearly full.
Top with a generous dollop of whipped cream.

name: Zinger
description: The Zinger is a vibrant and refreshing cocktail that combines the fruity notes of Peachtree schnapps with the citrusy fizz of Surge Cola. This drink is perfect for those looking for a sweet and energizing experience, reminiscent of the fun and carefree spirit of the early 2000s. It's a drink that brings back memories of summer parties and spontaneous gatherings.
instructions: Get a shot glass and pour in three shots of the Peachtree schnapps.
Do the same with the Surge Cola.
Down it like Scheetz would.

name: Zoksel
description: The Zoksel is a playful and refreshing concoction that combines various fizzy beverages with a hint of fruitiness. This cocktail is a testament to the creativity of mixology, where the boundaries of traditional cocktails are pushed to create something unique and enjoyable. The addition of lemon adds a zesty twist, making it a perfect drink for warm days or casual gatherings.
instructions: Pour the beer into a highball glass.
Add the root beer and lemonade.
Top with Coca-Cola and 7-Up.
Drizzle in the Creme de Cassis.
Garnish with a slice of lemon.

name: Zombie
description: The Zombie cocktail, created by Donn Beach in the 1930s, is a potent blend of rums and fruit juices, designed to transport you to a tropical paradise. Its vibrant flavors and colorful presentation make it a favorite among tiki enthusiasts. The cocktail is famously known for its high alcohol content and is often garnished with fresh fruit and mint.
instructions: Blend at high speed for no more than 5 seconds.
Pour into a glass.
Add ice cubes to fill.
Add the garnish.

name: Zambeer
description: The Zambeer is a unique cocktail that combines the anise-flavored liqueur Sambuca with the sweet, fizzy notes of root beer. This refreshing drink is perfect for those who enjoy a blend of herbal and sweet flavors, making it a delightful choice for warm evenings or casual gatherings.
instructions: Mix sambuca with root beer in a Collins glass.
Stir gently to combine.
Add ice cubes to fill the glass.

name: Zorbatini
description: The Zorbatini is a delightful twist on the classic Martini, incorporating the unique anise flavor of Ouzo, a traditional Greek spirit. This cocktail is perfect for those looking to explore new flavors while enjoying the elegance of a Martini. Garnished with a green olive, it offers a refreshing and aromatic experience.
instructions: Pour the Stoli Vodka and Ouzo into a mixing glass filled with ice.
Stir well until chilled.
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a green olive.

name: Zenmeister
description: The Zenmeister is a unique cocktail that combines the herbal complexity of Jägermeister with the sweet, fizzy notes of root beer. This drink is perfect for those looking to explore the fusion of herbal liqueurs and classic sodas, creating a refreshing and intriguing experience.
instructions: Pour 15 ml of Jägermeister into a Collins glass.
Add 15 ml of root beer.
Mix together gently and enjoy.

name: Zipperhead
description: The Zipperhead is a vibrant cocktail that showcases the beautiful layering of flavors, with the rich raspberry notes of Chambord complemented by the clean profile of vodka and topped with refreshing soda water. This drink is a visual delight and a refreshing choice for any occasion.
instructions: Fill glass with rocks.
Add straw before putting in liquor.
Layer the ingredients in order: add Chambord first, followed by vodka, and top with soda water.

name: Zima Blaster
description: The Zima Blaster is a vibrant cocktail that combines the refreshing taste of Zima, a clear malt beverage, with the rich, fruity notes of Chambord raspberry liqueur. This drink became popular in the 1990s, embodying the era's love for sweet and colorful cocktails. Perfect for summer gatherings or a nostalgic trip back in time, the Zima Blaster is sure to delight with its unique flavor profile.
instructions: Fill the hurricane glass with ice.
Pour in 90 ml of Chambord raspberry liqueur.
Fill the glass with 360 ml of Zima.
Mix gently and enjoy.

name: Zizi Coin-coin
description: The Zizi Coin-coin is a refreshing cocktail that combines the vibrant flavors of Cointreau and fresh citrus juice. Originating from the sunny shores of the Mediterranean, this drink is perfect for warm evenings and is often enjoyed in a stylish margarita glass. The addition of lemon or lime slices not only enhances the flavor but also adds a beautiful visual appeal.
instructions: Pour 150 ml of Cointreau over ice in the glass.
Add 60 ml of fresh lemon (or lime) juice.
Stir gently to combine the ingredients.
Garnish with slices of lemon or lime in the glass.

name: Zimadori Zinger
description: The Zimadori Zinger is a refreshing cocktail that combines the unique flavors of Midori melon liqueur with the crispness of Zima, a clear, fruit-flavored beer. This drink is perfect for warm weather and is often garnished with a cherry for a pop of color and sweetness. Its vibrant green hue and fruity taste make it a favorite among those looking for a light and fun beverage.
instructions: Pour Zima into a Collins glass over ice.
Pour the shot of Midori melon liqueur over the Zima.
Do not stir.
Garnish with a cherry.

name: Zippy's Revenge
description: Zippy's Revenge is a playful cocktail that combines the nostalgic flavors of grape Kool-Aid with the warmth of rum and the sweetness of amaretto. This vibrant drink is perfect for summer gatherings or a fun night in, evoking memories of childhood while delivering a refreshing kick.
instructions: Mix Kool-Aid with water to taste until desired sweetness is achieved.
Add 60 ml of Rum and 60 ml of Amaretto to the Kool-Aid mixture.
Shake well to dissolve the sugar in the Kool-Aid.
Serve cold over ice.

name: Ziemes Martini Apfelsaft
description: The Ziemes Martini Apfelsaft is a refreshing twist on the classic martini, incorporating the crisp sweetness of apple juice with the herbal complexity of vermouth. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a lighter, fruitier drink, and it showcases the versatility of vermouth in mixology.
instructions: Pour 120 ml of vermouth into a Collins glass.
Add 480 ml of apple juice.
Serve without ice, ensuring the apple juice is at room temperature.

name: 155 Belmont
description: The 155 Belmont is a vibrant cocktail that combines the rich flavors of dark and light rum with the refreshing zest of orange juice. This drink is a nod to the classic tiki cocktails that emerged in the mid-20th century, celebrating the tropical flavors and the art of blending spirits. Perfect for a summer day or a festive gathering, it’s served in a wine glass, making it a unique choice for cocktail enthusiasts.
instructions: Blend all ingredients with ice until smooth.
Serve in a wine glass.
Garnish with a carrot.

name: 110 in the shade
description: The '110 in the Shade' cocktail is a refreshing and bold drink that combines the vibrant flavors of tequila with the crispness of lager. This drink is perfect for hot summer days, evoking the feeling of lounging in the sun with a cold beverage in hand. The combination of beer and tequila creates a unique flavor profile that is both invigorating and satisfying.
instructions: Drop shooter in glass.
Fill with beer.

name: 151 Florida Bushwacker
description: The 151 Florida Bushwacker is a tropical delight that combines the flavors of rum, chocolate, and coconut, blended to creamy perfection. Originating from the beaches of Florida, this cocktail is a decadent treat that captures the essence of summer in every sip.
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Garnish with chocolate shavings if desired.

description: The 252 is a potent shot that combines the high-proof Bacardi 151 with the bold flavor of Wild Turkey bourbon. This cocktail is designed for those looking for a quick and intense experience, often consumed in a single gulp. Its origins are rooted in the party scene, where quick shots are favored for their immediate effects.
instructions: Add both ingredients to shot glass.
Shoot and enjoy responsibly.

name: 24k nightmare
description: The 24k Nightmare is a potent shot that combines the fiery cinnamon flavor of Goldschlager with the herbal complexity of Jägermeister and the minty kick of Rumple Minze, all rounded off by the high-proof Bacardi 151. This cocktail is not for the faint of heart, delivering a bold experience that is both sweet and intense, perfect for those looking to make a statement.
instructions: Add all ingredients into a shaker filled with ice.
Shake well to combine and chill.
Strain into a shot glass and serve.

name: 3 Wise Men
description: The '3 Wise Men' is a bold cocktail that combines three iconic American whiskies: Jack Daniels, Johnnie Walker, and Jim Beam. This drink is often enjoyed as a shot or a quick slam, embodying the spirit of camaraderie and celebration. Its origins are rooted in the party culture, where the combination of these whiskies creates a powerful and flavorful experience.
instructions: Pour 10 ml of Jack Daniels into a Collins glass.
Pour 10 ml of Johnnie Walker into the same glass.
Pour 10 ml of Jim Beam into the glass.
Slam it to the head.

name: 3-Mile Long Island Iced Tea
description: The 3-Mile Long Island Iced Tea is a playful twist on the classic Long Island Iced Tea, known for its potent mix of spirits and refreshing cola. This cocktail is a favorite for those looking to enjoy a vibrant drink that packs a punch, perfect for summer gatherings or a night out. The addition of sweet and sour balances the strong spirits, making it a delightful choice for adventurous drinkers.
instructions: Fill a 414ml Collins glass with ice.
Pour in the gin, light rum, tequila, triple sec, and vodka.
Fill 2/3 of the glass with Coca-Cola.
Top off with sweet and sour mix to fill the glass.
Add a dash of bitters and garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: 410 Gone
description: The 410 Gone is a refreshing cocktail that combines the sweet and fruity notes of peach vodka with the classic fizz of Coca-Cola. This drink is perfect for warm days and casual gatherings, offering a delightful balance of flavors that is both easy to make and enjoyable to sip.
instructions: Pour 60-90 ml of peach vodka into a Collins glass.
Top with Coca-Cola to taste, filling the glass.

description: The 50/50 cocktail is a refreshing blend that showcases the smoothness of vanilla vodka paired with the citrusy brightness of orange juice, accented by a hint of Grand Marnier. This drink is perfect for warm days and is a delightful twist on the classic vodka cocktail.
instructions: Fill the Collins glass with crushed ice.
Add 75 ml of vanilla vodka.
Add 1 ml of Grand Marnier.
Fill the glass with orange juice.

name: 501 Blue
description: The 501 Blue is a vibrant cocktail that showcases the beautiful blue hue of Blue Curacao, reminiscent of tropical waters. This refreshing drink combines the sweetness of blueberry schnapps with the crispness of vodka and a splash of sour mix, topped off with a fizzy finish from 7-Up. Perfect for summer gatherings or beach parties, this cocktail is as visually stunning as it is delicious.
instructions: Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Pour equal parts of Blue Curacao, blueberry schnapps, vodka, sour mix, and 7-Up into the glass.
Stir gently to combine the ingredients.

name: 57 Chevy with a White License Plate
description: The 57 Chevy with a White License Plate is a classic cocktail that embodies the spirit of the 1950s, reminiscent of the iconic car it is named after. This drink combines the smooth sweetness of white crème de cacao with the clean, crisp profile of vodka, creating a refreshing and delightful experience.
instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Add white crème de cacao and vodka.
Stir gently to combine.

name: 69 Special
description: The 69 Special is a refreshing cocktail that combines the crispness of gin with the sweetness of 7-Up, making it a perfect choice for warm weather. This drink is a nod to the classic Collins cocktails, often enjoyed for their light and bubbly nature. The addition of lemon juice adds a zesty twist, enhancing the overall flavor profile.
instructions: Pour 60 ml of dry gin into a Collins glass.
Add 120 ml of 7-Up.
Add 22 ml of lemon juice for flavor.
If desired, top up the glass with more 7-Up.

description: The 747 is a delightful shot that combines the rich flavors of coffee liqueur, creamy Irish whiskey, and hazelnut liqueur. This cocktail is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and indulgent treat, reminiscent of a dessert in a glass. Its unique blend of ingredients creates a harmonious balance that is sure to please any palate.
instructions: Pour Kahlua into the shot glass.
Add Baileys Irish Cream on top of the Kahlua.
Finish with Frangelico on top of the Baileys.
Serve immediately without chilling or layering.

name: 747 Drink
description: The 747 Drink is a refreshing cocktail that combines the crispness of vodka with the tartness of lime and cranberry, topped off with the effervescence of Sprite. This drink is perfect for warm weather and is often enjoyed in social settings, making it a popular choice for parties and gatherings.
instructions: Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Pour in vodka, lime cordial, and cranberry juice.
Fill up with Sprite.
Garnish with a lime wheel or some cranberries.

name: 9 1/2 Weeks
description: The 9 1/2 Weeks cocktail is inspired by the iconic film of the same name, which explores themes of passion and desire. This vibrant drink combines citrus flavors with a hint of strawberry, making it a refreshing choice for those looking to indulge in a taste of romance.
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a glass mixer.
Chill and strain into a coupe glass.
Garnish with sliced strawberry.
